Wootility, the configuration software, is the best in the category by a margin, and the latency scores of 9.8 are the result of real benchmark data.

The market narrative in 2026 is compelling: reviewers are describing the current keyboard landscape as unrecognizable compared to five years ago. Budget keyboards now ship with feature sets that would have cost $300 or more in 2021. The Keychron C3 Pro at $37 is being called out as the best budget option by multiple expert reviewers this spring, which is a reflection of this trend. This is good news for buyers who don't need Hall Effect gaming performance, because the value floor has risen significantly.

The ASUS ROG Strix Scope II 96 Wireless is drawing best-overall verdicts from some reviewers in 2026, and I want to address that directly. The Scope II 96's wireless implementation is genuinely excellent, and its 96% layout is a smart compromise between compact and full-featured. It scores well on build and features. It sits at rank 12 in this list because its switch technology and latency profile cannot compete with the Hall Effect keyboards ranked above it. For buyers who prioritize wireless freedom and a compact full-function layout over maximum competitive precision, the Scope II 96 is a legitimate recommendation, but it earns its position below the Wooting and SteelSeries Apex Pro options on measurable performance grounds.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE Remains the Hall Effect Competitive Standard
highlights.body: The 0.1mm rapid trigger and 0.1mm-to-4.0mm actuation point range remain the specifications every serious gaming keyboard is measured against. No 2026 release has displaced this. Wootility software offers per-key customization with no latency penalty, which is a meaningful feature engineering achievement. For competitive FPS and battle royale players where rapid trigger is the deciding factor, the Wooting 60HE is still the correct answer.

highlights.title: The 2026 Keyboard Market Is Unrecognizable From Five Years Ago
highlights.body: Budget keyboards now ship with POM plates, pre-lubed switches, gasket mounts, and RGB systems that previously required $300 investments. The Keychron C3 Pro at $37 is receiving best-budget recognition from expert reviewers this spring, and it is representative of a broader trend. For buyers who don't need Hall Effect gaming features, the $50-to-$80 tier in 2026 delivers an objectively better typing experience than the $150-to-$200 tier did in 2021.

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Strix Scope II 96 Wireless Gets Best Overall Mentions But Ranks 12th Here
highlights.body: Some 2026 reviewers are placing the Scope II 96 Wireless at the top of their lists, citing its wireless performance and compact layout. I respect the wireless implementation and the 96% layout thoughtfulness. It ranks 12th here because its switch latency profile and lack of Hall Effect technology cannot compete with the keyboards ranked above it on measurable gaming performance metrics. For buyers who prioritize wireless and layout over absolute competitive precision, it earns a genuine recommendation, just not the top position.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless Remains the Right Choice for Wireless Competitors
highlights.body: Hall Effect adjustable switches in a wireless package with proven connection reliability over a year of real-world use. The Apex Pro TKL Wireless's ability to match Wooting's actuation range without a wired connection makes it the correct recommendation for competitive players who refuse to be tethered. At second position, it earns its place as the best wireless gaming keyboard available today.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE 今天繼續排第一，這個結果在意料之中。Hall Effect 磁性開關技術已經成為 2026 年認真電競鍵盤的明確方向，而 Wooting 的實作是目前最成熟的。0.1mm 的極速觸發靈敏度加上 0.1mm 到 4.0mm 的可調節觸發點，這種靈活性是傳統機械開關根本做不到的。Wootility 配置軟體在這個類別裡領先一個量級，9.8 的延遲分數來自真實基準測試。

2026 年鍵盤市場的一個重要趨勢值得說明：評測者描述現在的鍵盤市場和五年前相比已經認不出來了。預算型鍵盤現在出廠就有 POM 板、預潤開關、軟彈式結構、RGB 系統，這些功能以前要花三百美元以上才有。Keychron C3 Pro 只要 $37，今年春天被多個評測者稱為最佳預算選擇，這就是這個趨勢的縮影。

ASUS ROG Strix Scope II 96 Wireless 在一些評測者的 2026 名單裡拿到「最佳整體」，我想直接說明這件事。Scope II 96 的無線效能確實很好，96% 配列也是個聰明的格局選擇。它在這份名單排第 12 是因為它的開關延遲表現和沒有 Hall Effect 技術這兩件事，在可測量的競技效能指標上沒辦法和名單前段的鍵盤競爭。對於優先考慮無線和緊湊全功能配列而不是最高競技精度的買家，Scope II 96 是值得考慮的推薦，只是不是第一名。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 繼續是 Hall Effect 競技鍵盤的基準
highlights.body: 0.1mm 極速觸發和 0.1mm 到 4.0mm 可調節觸發點，到現在還沒有 2026 年的新品超過這個標準。Wootility 軟體提供按鍵層級客製化而且沒有延遲懲罰，這是有意義的功能工程成就。對極速觸發是決定性因素的競技 FPS 和大逃殺玩家，Wooting 60HE 依然是正確答案。

highlights.title: 2026 年的鍵盤市場和五年前比已認不出來
highlights.body: 預算型鍵盤現在出廠就有 POM 板、預潤開關、軟彈式安裝結構和 RGB，這些功能以前要三百美元才有。Keychron C3 Pro 只要 $37，今年春天拿到多個評測者的最佳預算獎，這代表了整個市場底線的提升。對不需要 Hall Effect 競技功能的買家，2026 年的 $50 到 $80 區間提供的打字體驗客觀上比 2021 年的 $150 到 $200 區間更好。

highlights.title: ASUS ROG Strix Scope II 96 Wireless 被一些評測者稱為最佳，但這裡排第 12
highlights.body: 部分 2026 評測者把 Scope II 96 Wireless 排在最前面，理由是無線效能和緊湊配列。無線實作確實很好，96% 格局的設計也很有想法。它在這裡排第 12 是因為開關延遲表現和沒有 Hall Effect 技術在可測量的電競指標上沒法跟名單前段比。對優先考慮無線和配列設計而不是最高競技精度的買家，它是真正值得推薦的選擇，只是不是頂端位置。

references.title: Best mechanical keyboards 2026: top gaming and typing picks

en.commentary: Mechanical keyboard rankings hold steady this week. The Wooting 60HE holds #1 with analog Hall effect switches that no optical or mechanical competitor replicates at this price point. Rapid Trigger — where the switch reactivates the moment it moves up even a fraction of a millimeter — is a genuine competitive gaming advantage for FPS players. Switch and latency scores both at 9.8 are the highest in this ranking. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at #2 brings adjustable actuation across every key with wireless convenience. Wooting 80HE at #3 offers the same switch technology in a full-size layout for users who need a numpad. Keychron Q1 Pro at #4 leads on build quality at 9.5 — CNC aluminum chassis with south-facing RGB is the best physical construction in this ranking for typing-focused use.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE's Rapid Trigger is the competitive gaming standard
highlights.body: Analog Hall effect switches with Rapid Trigger activation let each keystroke reset the moment the key begins moving upward, regardless of physical actuation point. This eliminates the mechanical deadzone that standard switches have, producing faster re-actuation in competitive FPS games. No other keyboard in this ranking replicates this specific advantage.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro at #4 is the typing-focused pick over gaming
highlights.body: CNC aluminum chassis at 9.5 build quality produces a solid, satisfying typing feel that plastic-body keyboards cannot match. South-facing RGB avoids LED shining through switch stems. For writers and programmers who prioritize typing feedback over gaming performance, the Q1 Pro is the right answer.

highlights.title: NuPhy Air75 V2 at #10 is the best thin-and-light mechanical keyboard
highlights.body: Low-profile Gateron switches in an ultra-slim aluminum chassis create a mechanical keyboard for laptop users who want the key feel without the height. The 9.0 value score reflects competitive pricing for the build materials. For desk setups where height clearance is a concern, the Air75 V2 solves that problem without compromising on key feel.

zh-tw.commentary: 機械鍵盤市場這週沒有新動作，排名維持穩定。Wooting 60HE 以類比霍爾感應軸和 Rapid Trigger 功能守住第 1，這個技術讓按鍵一開始往上移動就立刻重置觸發，消除傳統機械軸的物理死區，對 FPS 電競玩家是實質的競技優勢。軸體和延遲分數都是 9.8，是這個排名最高的。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 第 2 名以全鍵可調觸發鍵程加上無線便利性守住位置。Keychron Q1 Pro 第 4 名以鋁合金 CNC 機身的 9.5 建造質感在打字場景上無可取代，是這個排名裡打字體驗最好的選擇。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 的 Rapid Trigger 是目前電競鍵盤的技術標竿
highlights.body: 類比霍爾感應軸搭配 Rapid Trigger，讓按鍵在任何位置開始往上移動就立刻重置觸發，消除了傳統機械軸的物理死區。FPS 遊戲裡的重複按鍵速度因此更快，這個優勢在其他排名的鍵盤裡找不到對等的技術。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 第 4 名是打字場景的首選
highlights.body: CNC 鋁合金機身的建造質感分數 9.5 是整個排名最高，紮實的重量和精密的金屬手感是塑膠機身鍵盤無法複製的。朝下 RGB 燈位設計讓燈光不會透過軸體直射眼睛。對以打字而非遊戲為主的用戶，Q1 Pro 是最值得的選擇。

highlights.title: NuPhy Air75 V2 第 10 名是最好的低矮機械鍵盤
highlights.body: 低矮 Gateron 軸搭超薄鋁合金機身，在保留機械鍵盤手感的前提下把厚度降到最低。對習慣筆電鍵盤高度、或桌面空間受限需要低矮鍵盤的用戶，Air75 V2 是目前最好的解答。

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE holds #1 and the argument for it is stronger in April 2026 than it was a year ago. The 60% form factor with Hall Effect switches, 0.1mm–4.0mm adjustable actuation, and rapid trigger at 0.1mm resolution continues to be the best implementation of magnetic analog technology in a gaming keyboard. Counter-strafing improvement in FPS games is measurable and consistent across Wooting's user reports. The Keychron Q1 Pro at #4 remains my top recommendation for someone who wants a mechanical keyboard for typing and occasional gaming — not pure competitive gaming. Build quality is excellent, QMK/Via support is full, and the gasket mount provides a premium typing sound that $37 budget boards cannot approach. ASUS ROG Azoth and Keychron Q5 Max are both strong 2026 contenders noted in reviews, but neither displaces the current rankings meaningfully. The Wooting 80HE at #3 gives the same Hall Effect advantage in a larger layout for those who want a numpad.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE's rapid trigger at 0.1mm is the competitive gaming standard
highlights.body: 0.1mm rapid trigger sensitivity means the keyboard can re-register a key release and press faster than any mechanical spring can physically travel. In Counter-Strike 2 and Valorant, this translates to tighter counter-strafes. No other keyboard in any price range matches this specification.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the best keyboard for mixed typing and gaming use
highlights.body: QMK/Via programmability, full gasket mount, hot-swap PCB, and north-facing PCB for RGB clearance — all at under $200. This is the keyboard I put on the desk of someone who codes, writes, and plays games without a dedicated competitive focus.

highlights.title: Budget entry points have genuinely improved in 2026
highlights.body: Keychron C3 Pro at $37 and Royal Kludge R65 at $60 both offer QMK/Via support and gasket mounting — features that were premium-only two years ago. The value proposition at the entry level is real.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 繼續坐穩第一，而且 2026 年四月支持它的理由比一年前更強。60% 配列搭配霍爾效應軸體、0.1mm–4.0mm 可調觸發點、0.1mm 精度的快速觸發，是目前磁性類比技術在電競鍵盤上最好的實作。在 FPS 遊戲裡反方向走位的提升有明確的可量測數據，用戶回報也一致。Keychron Q1 Pro 排第四，是我推薦給想要一把打字和偶爾打電動都能用的機械鍵盤的最佳選擇，純粹競技需求另當別論。做工優秀，完整的 QMK/Via 支援，墊片結構帶來的打字聲音是 NT$1,200 的預算板追不上的。ASUS ROG Azoth 和 Keychron Q5 Max 在 2026 年的評測裡都有很高評價，但都沒有強到要調整現有排名的程度。Wooting 80HE 排第三，給想要數字鍵盤的玩家同樣的霍爾效應優勢。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 的 0.1mm 快速觸發是競技電競的標準
highlights.body: 0.1mm 快速觸發靈敏度讓鍵盤可以在實體彈簧來不及運動到底的情況下重新登錄一次按鍵，在 CS2 和 Valorant 裡這會直接轉化為更緊的反向走位，沒有其他鍵盤在任何價位上能匹敵這個規格。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是打字和電玩混合使用的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 完整的 QMK/Via 可程式化、全墊片結構、熱插拔 PCB、朝北 PCB 讓 RGB 燈效不被遮擋，全都在 NT$6,000 以內。這是我擺在寫程式、寫文章、打遊戲但沒有純競技需求的人桌上的鍵盤。

highlights.title: 2026 年入門選擇的性價比確實提升了
highlights.body: Keychron C3 Pro NT$1,200、Royal Kludge R65 NT$2,000，這兩款都有 QMK/Via 支援和墊片結構，這些兩年前還是高階才有的功能，現在入門價就能拿到，買點是真實的。

en.commentary:
Wooting 60HE holds rank 1 in April 2026, and the pro gaming data in ProSettings.net's April 2026 dataset confirms this is the correct verdict. The Wooting 60HE+ is used by 11.6% of tracked professional esports players, making it the third most-used keyboard among 2,252 tracked pros — a real-world validation that no review score can substitute. Hall effect switches with 0.1mm actuation precision and rapid trigger at 0.1mm sensitivity are the technical specifications that competitive keyboard buyers now treat as minimum requirements.

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless earns rank 2 as the best commercially available alternative with Hall effect switches, premium build quality, and a software ecosystem that includes Rapid Trigger mode with actuation protection. The wireless implementation is the cleanest available in a Hall effect TKL at this price point.

Wooting 80HE holds rank 3 — the 80% form factor adds a function row and dedicated arrow keys while preserving the same hall effect switch platform as the 60HE. According to ProSettings data, 13.41% of tracked pros use it, making it the second most-used keyboard in the dataset. For buyers who want the Wooting platform in a more feature-complete layout, the 80HE is the right choice.

Pro gaming data confirms that Hall effect keyboards now dominate competitive play at the top level. Traditional mechanical switch keyboards are becoming the value-tier option in serious gaming contexts.

highlights.title: ProSettings April 2026 Data Confirms Hall Effect Keyboard Dominance in Competitive Play
highlights.body: The Wooting 80HE at 13.41% and 60HE+ at 11.6% of 2,252 tracked professional esports players means Wooting alone accounts for 25% of professional keyboard usage. Combined with SteelSeries Apex Pro, Hall effect keyboards represent the dominant choice at the professional level — a clear signal for competitive buyers.

highlights.title: Wooting's 0.1mm Rapid Trigger Sensitivity Sets the Precision Standard
highlights.body: The ability to reset a keypress within 0.1mm of travel means bunny-hopping, counter-strafing, and rapid input sequences that require precise timing can be executed with timing precision that traditional mechanical switches cannot replicate. The physics of hall effect switches — no physical contact point — enables this precision.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless Is the Best Commercially Available Alternative
highlights.body: For buyers who want Hall effect keyboard technology without the wait times and limited availability that sometimes affect Wooting's direct order system, the Apex Pro TKL Wireless is immediately available through mainstream retailers at a competitive price. The actuations protection feature prevents adjacent key false inputs during rapid sequences.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE 在 2026 年四月繼續是機械鍵盤第一名，ProSettings.net 四月 2026 年的電競選手使用數據支持這個判斷。Wooting 60HE+ 被 11.6% 的追蹤職業電競選手使用，在 2,252 名追蹤職業選手中排第三，這種真實世界的驗證是任何評測分數替代不了的。Hall effect 磁軸的 0.1mm 觸發精度和 0.1mm 靈敏度的 Rapid Trigger，是競技鍵盤買家現在視為最低要求的技術規格。

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 第二名，是市面上可以直接買到的最佳 Hall effect 替代選項，有頂級做工和包含 Rapid Trigger 模式的軟體生態系，以及最乾淨的 TKL 無線實作。

Wooting 80HE 第三名，80% 鍵位版型加入了功能列和獨立方向鍵，同時保留和 60HE 相同的 Hall effect 磁軸平台。ProSettings 數據顯示 13.41% 的追蹤職業選手使用它，是數據集裡第二常用的鍵盤。想要 Wooting 平台但需要更完整鍵位配置的買家，80HE 是對的選擇。

職業電競數據確認 Hall effect 鍵盤現在主導了競技遊戲的頂層，傳統機械軸鍵盤在認真電競場景裡正在變成入門選項。

highlights.title: ProSettings 2026 年四月數據確認 Hall effect 鍵盤主導競技舞台
highlights.body: Wooting 80HE 佔 13.41%、60HE+ 佔 11.6%，光是 Wooting 就佔了 2,252 名追蹤職業選手中 25% 的使用比例。加上 SteelSeries Apex Pro，Hall effect 鍵盤在職業層級已經是主流選擇，這是競技玩家購買決策的清楚信號。

highlights.title: Wooting 的 0.1mm Rapid Trigger 靈敏度設立了精準度標準
highlights.body: 0.1mm 以內就能重置按鍵的能力讓 bunny-hop、counter-strafe 和需要精確時機的快速輸入序列可以以傳統機械軸做不到的時機精度執行。Hall effect 磁軸沒有實體觸發點的物理特性是這個精準度的技術基礎。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是最好的市售替代選項
highlights.body: 對不想等待或面對 Wooting 直接訂購系統的买家，Apex Pro TKL Wireless 可以在主流零售通路立即購買。觸發保護功能避免了快速輸入序列中的鄰鍵誤觸，是值得注意的實用設計。

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE holds the top position in April 2026, and for competitive gaming it is the correct choice. Hall Effect magnetic switches with 0.1mm Rapid Trigger sensitivity and adjustable actuation from 0.1mm to 4.0mm give you the most precise input control available in any retail keyboard. The Wootility software is the best keyboard configuration tool in the category — it handles per-key actuation, rapid trigger zones, and analog input profiles in a way that no competitor matches. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless earns second for players who want the Rapid Trigger advantage with wireless freedom. Wooting 80HE at third is the 75% form factor version of the 60HE for players who want function keys without going full tenkeyless.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE Rapid Trigger at 0.1mm Is the Competitive Standard
highlights.body: 0.1mm Rapid Trigger sensitivity means the switch resets in the minimum possible travel — critical for counter-strafing in titles like CS2 and Valorant. The 8000Hz polling rate ensures every input registers before the next frame. This is the technically correct competitive keyboard.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless Brings Rapid Trigger Without the Cable
highlights.body: Wireless Rapid Trigger at 4000Hz polling eliminates the last cable argument for competitive players who prefer wireless peripherals. The combination of OmniPoint 2.0 switches and wireless connectivity makes it the most complete wireless competitive keyboard available.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro Is the Typing Quality Benchmark
highlights.body: Gasket mounting, aluminum body, QMK/VIA compatibility, and wireless capability in a premium build package — the Q1 Pro is what the keyboard community means when they say 'endgame' for typing-focused users. It is not optimized for competitive gaming but is the correct choice for everything else.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，競技遊戲的首選鍵盤。磁感應霍爾效應軸體搭配 0.1mm Rapid Trigger 靈敏度和 0.1mm 到 4.0mm 的可調觸發點，輸入精準度是目前零售市場最高的。Wootility 軟體是這個分類最好的鍵盤設定工具，每鍵觸發點、快速觸發區域、類比輸入設定全部都能精細調整。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 以無線版 Rapid Trigger 拿第二，想要競技優勢又不想要線材束縛的玩家，這是正確選擇。Wooting 80HE 是 60HE 的 75% 版本，想要 Function 鍵的玩家選這個。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 的 0.1mm Rapid Trigger 是競技標準
highlights.body: 0.1mm Rapid Trigger 靈敏度讓軸體在最短行程內重置，CS2 和 Valorant 的反向走位需要的就是這個。8000Hz 回報率確保每個輸入在下一幀之前就被記錄，技術上這是目前最正確的競技鍵盤。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 無線版 Rapid Trigger
highlights.body: 4000Hz 無線 Rapid Trigger 讓你不需要在競技優勢和無線自由之間做選擇。OmniPoint 2.0 軸體加上無線連線，是目前最完整的無線競技鍵盤。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是打字體驗的標竿
highlights.body: 墊圈式安裝、鋁合金外殼、QMK/VIA 相容性加上無線功能，Q1 Pro 是鍵盤玩家說的「終點站」，打字體驗和自定義自由度找不到對手。不是為競技遊戲優化的，但其他所有用途都是正確選擇。

references.title: Best gaming keyboards in 2026
The 6 Best Gaming Keyboards of 2026

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE+ stays at #1, and April 2026 esports data makes this the easiest call on this entire site. ProSettings.net's April 2026 dataset of 2,252 tracked professional players shows Wooting keyboards — the 60HE+ and 80HE combined — are used by 25% of tracked pros. The Lekker L60 V2 Hall effect switches achieve the fastest keystroke registration of any switch type available, and Wootility remains the best keyboard configuration software in the industry. Rapid Trigger at 0.1mm resolution means the switch registers depress and reset events at intervals no mechanical switch can approach. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at #2 earns its position because it pairs analog Hall effect switches with a wireless implementation that maintains competitive-level polling through its 2.4GHz connection. For players who want the Wooting switch advantage in a full-size layout, the Wooting 80HE at #3 is the answer. The Keychron Q1 Pro at #4 is the pick for typing-focused users: its CNC aluminum frame and gasket mount produce a sound profile that no other keyboard on this list matches.

highlights.title: 25% of tracked pro esports players use Wooting — this is not brand hype
highlights.body: ProSettings.net's April 2026 dataset of 2,252 professionals shows the Wooting 60HE+ and 80HE collectively used by about 25% of tracked players. This is the market confirming performance, not marketing claiming it. Hall effect switches with 0.1mm Rapid Trigger have become the competitive standard because the registration advantage is real at high skill levels.

highlights.title: Hall effect is replacing mechanical as the pro gaming switch type
highlights.body: All three top keyboards — Wooting 60HE+, Apex Pro TKL Wireless, and Wooting 80HE — use either Hall effect or analog optical switches. Traditional mechanical switches have essentially exited the pro competitive scene. For casual and typing users, mechanical switches retain their appeal; for competitive gaming, analog sensing is now the baseline expectation.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the build quality benchmark for this price
highlights.body: At its price point, the Q1 Pro's CNC aluminum top and bottom housing with gasket mount produces a typing feel and sound profile that no ABS or polycarbonate chassis can replicate. For users who spend more time writing than gaming, the Q1 Pro is the correct pick — Wootility software excellence is irrelevant if you're not doing competitive gaming.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE+ 繼續排第一，四月份的電競數據讓這個位置毫無爭議。ProSettings.net 追蹤的 2252 名職業選手資料顯示，Wooting 鍵盤（60HE+ 和 80HE 合計）被大約 25% 的職業選手使用。Lekker L60 V2 霍爾效應軸的按鍵觸發速度是目前所有軸體類型裡最快的，Wootility 軟體在業界的評價也是最頂的，0.1mm 精度的 Rapid Trigger 讓觸發和重置速度是任何機械軸都追不上的。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 排第二，它在霍爾效應軸之外還做到了 2.4GHz 無線連接維持競技級 polling rate 的組合，這個整合做得紮實。Keychron Q1 Pro 排第四，給以打字為主的用戶推薦，CNC 鋁合金外殼加上墊片安裝的聲音調校，在這個價位沒有對手。

highlights.title: 25% 職業選手用 Wooting，這是市場驗證，不是品牌行銷
highlights.body: ProSettings.net 四月份的 2252 名職業玩家資料，Wooting 60HE+ 和 80HE 加起來被約 25% 的選手使用。這是績效數據在說話。霍爾效應軸加上 0.1mm Rapid Trigger 已經成為競技場上的標配，因為在高水準操作下，觸發速度的優勢是真實可以感受到的。

highlights.title: 霍爾效應軸正在取代機械軸成為電競標準
highlights.body: 這份名單前三名，Wooting 60HE+、Apex Pro TKL Wireless、Wooting 80HE，全部都是霍爾效應或類比光學軸。傳統機械軸已經基本退出職業競技舞台。對休閒和打字用戶來說機械軸還是有它的樂趣，但在競技遊戲場景，類比感應已經是基本期待了。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 的做工是這個價位的標竿
highlights.body: Q1 Pro 的 CNC 鋁合金上下蓋加上墊片安裝的打字手感和聲音調校，是任何 ABS 或 PC 外殼都複製不了的體驗。如果你的時間主要花在打字而不是電競，Q1 Pro 才是正確選擇，Wootility 軟體的優勢對你來說不重要。

en.commentary: I'm swapping the #2 and #3 positions today. The Wooting 80HE moves up to #2, and the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless drops to #3. The reason is data, not preference: ProSettings.net's April 2026 dataset of 2,252 tracked pros now shows the Wooting 80HE at 13.41% adoption, beating the Apex Pro TKL on raw share. The 80HE is the right pick over the Apex Pro for users who want full Hall effect performance in a TKL form factor without the price compromise of going wireless. The 60HE+ stays at #1 — 60% layout suits the largest pro audience, and at 11.6% adoption it's still the second-most-used board overall. The pattern is clear: in 2026, three of every ten tracked pros are using a Wooting board. Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL still leads single-product adoption at 15.01% but it's a TKL optical-mechanical that doesn't offer Hall effect, so it doesn't compete with the Wooting line on the criteria that drive my ranking. Keychron Q1 Pro at #4 keeps its position as the typing pick.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE moves to #2 on validated 13.41% pro adoption
highlights.body: ProSettings.net's April 2026 dataset shows 13.41% of tracked professional FPS players using the Wooting 80HE. Combined with the 60HE+ at 11.6%, Wooting boards are now used by 25% of tracked professionals. This is the largest single-brand share in the competitive scene. Promoting the 80HE to #2 reflects that pro adoption signal.

highlights.title: Hall effect is now the pro competitive baseline
highlights.body: Of the top three keyboards on this list, two are Wooting Hall effect designs and the third (Apex Pro TKL Wireless) uses analog Hall effect switches. Traditional mechanical switches have effectively exited the top of the competitive scene. For competitive gaming buyers in 2026, analog sensing is the entry-level requirement, not a premium feature.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro stays the typing-first pick
highlights.body: If you spend more time writing code, documents, or chat than competing in FPS games, the Q1 Pro's CNC aluminum gasket-mounted construction delivers a typing experience the analog gaming boards don't try to match. The 9.5 build quality score and 9.0 value rating reflect that this is the right keyboard for a different user.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天我把第二跟第三名對調。Wooting 80HE 升到第二，SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 降到第三。理由是數據，不是偏好。ProSettings.net 四月份的 2252 名職業玩家資料顯示 Wooting 80HE 採用率達到 13.41%，原始市佔率已經超過 Apex Pro TKL。80HE 對想要 TKL 規格全 Hall effect 表現但不想為了無線而妥協價格的用戶，是比 Apex Pro 更對的選擇。60HE+ 維持第一，60% 配置適合最大宗的職業選手族群，採用率 11.6% 也還是整體第二高的鍵盤。趨勢很明確，2026 年每十個追蹤的職業選手有三個用 Wooting 鍵盤。Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL 單品採用率還是最高的 15.01%，但它是 TKL 光學機械軸，沒有 Hall effect，所以不在我這份榜單評分標準裡跟 Wooting 競爭。Keychron Q1 Pro 排第四維持打字導向選擇的位置。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 升到第二，靠的是 13.41% 職業選手採用率
highlights.body: ProSettings.net 四月份資料顯示 13.41% 追蹤的職業 FPS 選手在用 Wooting 80HE。加上 60HE+ 的 11.6%，Wooting 鍵盤現在被 25% 的職業選手使用，是競技場上最大的單一品牌市佔。把 80HE 升到第二反映了這個職業採用訊號。

highlights.title: Hall effect 現在是職業競技基本標配
highlights.body: 這份榜單前三名，兩個是 Wooting Hall effect 設計，第三個 Apex Pro TKL Wireless 也用類比 Hall effect 軸。傳統機械軸已經基本退出職業競技舞台。對 2026 年的競技遊戲買家，類比感應是入門需求，不是高階配備。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 維持打字優先的選擇
highlights.body: 如果你花更多時間在寫程式、寫文件、聊天而不是 FPS 競技，Q1 Pro 的 CNC 鋁合金墊片安裝結構提供類比遊戲鍵盤不會想去模仿的打字體驗。9.5 的做工評分跟 9.0 性價比反映這是給不同用戶的正確鍵盤。

references.title: Wooting 80HE Review
Best gaming keyboards in 2026

en.commentary: Mechanical keyboard rankings have stabilized in May 2026 because Hall effect switches have settled into the dominant choice for serious users and the Wooting 60HE is the keyboard that proved it. Hall effect switches give you per-key actuation point adjustment, the lowest input latency in any switch type, and zero contact bounce. Wooting 60HE at #1 holds because the firmware is the most polished and the rapid trigger implementation is what every other Hall effect keyboard copies. Wooting 80HE at #2 is the same keyboard at full size for typists. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at #3 is the Hall effect entry that ships with a wireless dongle and works on consoles. Keychron Q1 Pro at #4 is the enthusiast tactile-switch pick. Logitech G915 TKL at #5 is the productivity TKL. Ducky One3 at #6 is the boutique tactile pick. Corsair K100 Air at #7 is the slim profile choice. Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro at #8 is the gaming RGB pick. Keychron K8 Pro at #9 is the Mac/PC dual pick. NuPhy Air75 V2 at #10 is the low-profile travel keyboard. Skip every membrane keyboard in 2026.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE holds first because Hall effect rapid trigger changed competitive gaming
highlights.body: Per-key actuation point. Rapid trigger that registers the moment the key starts to release, not after it hits 2mm of travel. Counter-Strike and Valorant pros made the switch because the input lag advantage is measurable. At $199 it is the keyboard that defined the Hall effect category.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the Hall effect keyboard that works on consoles
highlights.body: Wireless dongle, USB-C, and the OLED screen on the keyboard for macros and Discord status. The Hall effect switches are SteelSeries's own and the rapid trigger implementation is the closest to Wooting's. At $249 it is more expensive than the 60HE and the right pick for buyers who play on PS5 and PC.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the enthusiast tactile-switch pick
highlights.body: Aluminum body, hot-swappable switches, programmable everything via VIA, and the build quality is two grades above any pre-built mechanical keyboard at this price. At $199 the Q1 Pro is the right pick for typists who want a tactile feel and an enthusiast keyboard without ordering a kit and soldering.

highlights.title: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro is the gaming RGB pick that does not feel cheap
highlights.body: Razer Green or Yellow switches, command dial, three macro keys, and the underglow that earns the price premium for streamers and content creators. At $229 it is priced against the Q1 Pro and the choice is whether you want hot-swap and tactile, or RGB and macro keys.

highlights.title: Skip every membrane keyboard in 2026
highlights.body: The price gap between membrane and entry mechanical keyboards has closed to $40. Mechanical switches last 10x longer, type with a real tactile feedback, and the actuation force is consistent across all keys. The $40 membrane keyboard is the most expensive keyboard you will own because you will replace it every 18 months.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月機械鍵盤排行很穩，霍爾效應開關已經是認真使用者的主流選擇，Wooting 60HE 就是證明這件事的鍵盤。霍爾效應開關給你每鍵可調觸發點、所有開關類型最低輸入延遲、零接點彈跳。Wooting 60HE 排第一守住，韌體最完整、Rapid Trigger 實作是其他霍爾鍵盤抄的。Wooting 80HE 排第二是全尺寸版本，給打字派。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 排第三是配無線接收器的霍爾入門款，主機也能用。Keychron Q1 Pro 排第四是發燒友觸感選擇。Logitech G915 TKL 排第五是生產力 TKL。Ducky One3 排第六是精品觸感選擇。Corsair K100 Air 排第七是薄型選擇。Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro 排第八是電競 RGB 選擇。Keychron K8 Pro 排第九是 Mac/PC 雙系統選擇。NuPhy Air75 V2 排第十是低剖面攜帶鍵盤。2026 年薄膜鍵盤全部跳過。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 守住第一是因為霍爾 Rapid Trigger 改變了競技遊戲
highlights.body: 每鍵觸發點。Rapid Trigger 在按鍵開始釋放的瞬間就登錄，不是按鍵跳回 2mm 之後。Counter-Strike 跟 Valorant 職業選手換過去就是因為輸入延遲優勢可量化。台灣 6,500 元，是定義霍爾效應品類的鍵盤。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是主機能用的霍爾鍵盤
highlights.body: 無線接收器、USB-C、鍵盤上 OLED 螢幕顯示巨集跟 Discord 狀態。霍爾開關是 SteelSeries 自家的，Rapid Trigger 實作最接近 Wooting。台灣 8,200 元比 60HE 貴，給 PS5 跟 PC 都玩的買家。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是發燒友觸感選擇
highlights.body: 鋁合金機身、熱插拔開關、VIA 全可程式化、作工比同價位預組鍵盤好兩級。台灣 6,500 元是想要觸感打字又想要發燒友鍵盤又不想自己買套件焊接的人選擇。

highlights.title: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro 是不會感覺廉價的電競 RGB 選擇
highlights.body: Razer 綠軸或黃軸、指令旋鈕、三個巨集鍵、底部燈光對得起實況主跟內容創作者多花的錢。台灣 7,500 元定價打 Q1 Pro，選熱插拔加觸感還是 RGB 加巨集鍵而已。

highlights.title: 2026 年薄膜鍵盤全部跳過
highlights.body: 薄膜跟入門機械鍵盤價差只剩 1,500 元台幣。機械開關壽命長 10 倍、有真正觸感回饋、所有按鍵觸發力一致。1,500 元薄膜鍵盤是你會擁有最貴的鍵盤，因為每 18 個月你就得換一次。

references.title: Wooting 80HE Review
Best gaming keyboards in 2026

en.commentary: Hall-effect switches and rapid trigger went from niche enthusiast tech to default competitive standard over the past 18 months, and my keyboard rankings now reflect that reality. The Wooting 60HE+ stays in first place because it's still the cleanest implementation of analog hall-effect input I've used, and Wooting's firmware genuinely lets me set per-key actuation depth in a way that translates to measurable improvement in Counter-Strike movement scripts. The Wooting 80HE in second adds a function row and dedicated arrow cluster for people who actually code or write for a living, and the build quality finally caught up to Keychron's machined-aluminum standard. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless ties for second place because the 2026 OmniPoint 3.0 switches narrowed the gap with Wooting on response while keeping the brand's mainstream availability and software polish. Keychron's Q1 Pro is the keyboard I keep telling typists and writers to buy, full aluminum, hot-swap MX-style switches, gasket mount, and a price that undercuts most boutique keyboards by half. Logitech G915 TKL closes the top five as the only mainstream wireless low-profile board worth considering, though its switches feel dated next to anything analog. The honest market truth: if you play competitive shooters, hall-effect is no longer optional, and if you don't, the gasket-mount mid-tier crowd has gotten so good that you barely need to spend more than $200 to get a board that types beautifully.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ remains the competitive shooter standard
highlights.body: Three years after launch, Wooting still ships the firmware updates that make this keyboard better with age. The new SnapTap mode handles strafing transitions in CS2 with measurable advantage, the per-key analog response curve genuinely changes how I land precision shots in Apex, and the build quality of the latest revision is finally a step above the OEM plastic that earlier units shipped with. If you take competitive FPS seriously, the discussion starts and ends here.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the writer's keyboard I keep recommending
highlights.body: Full CNC aluminum chassis, gasket mount that genuinely flexes the way reviewers claim, hot-swap MX-style sockets that take any switch you want to throw at them, and a wireless implementation that doesn't sacrifice latency for the keyboard you're actually typing on. I've been using mine for two years and the south-facing RGB still looks the day I got it. For writers, programmers, anyone who types for hours, this is the obvious choice under $250.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the mainstream pick that finally caught up
highlights.body: OmniPoint 3.0 narrowed the analog response gap with Wooting to the point where I can recommend SteelSeries to gamers who want hall-effect performance plus the polish of mainstream software, retail availability, and warranty support. The wireless implementation works without dropouts, the OLED screen is genuinely useful for showing Discord notifications, and the build quality matches keyboards twice the price. For a buyer who wants competitive performance without enthusiast hassle, this is the right answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 過去 18 個月霍爾效應軸跟快速觸發從小眾發燒友技術變成競技預設標準，我的鍵盤排名也跟著改寫了。第一名 Wooting 60HE+ 站穩位置，這仍然是我用過最乾淨的類比霍爾效應實作，Wooting 韌體可以針對每顆鍵設定觸發深度，在 CS2 走位腳本上的差異是可以量測出來的。第二名 Wooting 80HE 多了功能列跟獨立方向鍵，給真的在寫程式或寫稿維生的人，做工終於追上 Keychron 的鋁合金 CNC 水準。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 並列第二，2026 年 OmniPoint 3.0 把跟 Wooting 的反應差距拉近，同時保留主流通路的可購性跟軟體完整度。Keychron Q1 Pro 是我一直推薦給打字族跟作家的選擇，全鋁合金、熱插拔 MX 軸、墊片結構、價格還砍掉大部分客製鍵盤一半。Logitech G915 TKL 排第五，是現在唯一值得考慮的主流無線矮軸鍵盤，雖然按鍵手感跟類比軸比起來真的有點老派。老實說，現在的市場真相是，如果你打競技 FPS，霍爾效應已經不是選項而是必需品；如果你不打，中價位墊片結構的鍵盤已經做得太好，NT$6,000 就有打字手感很棒的選擇。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ 仍然是競技 FPS 的標準答案
highlights.body: 上市三年了，Wooting 還在持續推韌體更新讓這把鍵盤越用越好。新的 SnapTap 模式處理 CS2 換邊走位確實有可量化的優勢，每顆鍵的類比反應曲線真的改變我在 Apex 裡的精準射擊判定，最新批次的做工終於擺脫早期那種 OEM 塑膠感。如果你認真打競技 FPS，討論從這把開始也從這把結束。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是我一直在推薦的寫稿鍵盤
highlights.body: 全 CNC 鋁合金外殼、墊片結構是真的會 Q 彈不是行銷詞、熱插拔 MX 插座你想換什麼軸都可以，無線連線也沒在你最常用的這把鍵盤上犧牲延遲。我自己用了兩年，南向 RGB 還跟剛買來一樣亮。給寫稿、寫程式、每天敲鍵盤好幾小時的人，NT$8,000 以下這把就是答案。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是終於追上來的主流選擇
highlights.body: OmniPoint 3.0 把跟 Wooting 在類比反應上的差距縮到我可以放心推薦給一般玩家的程度，同時保留主流軟體完整度、實體通路可購性、跟保固服務。無線連線穩定不掉線，OLED 螢幕拿來顯示 Discord 通知是真的有用，做工水準跟兩倍價格的鍵盤相當。給想要競技效能但不想搞發燒社群那一套的人，這把就對了。

references.title: Wooting 80HE Review
Best gaming keyboards in 2026

en.commentary: Hall-effect keyboards have completed their transition from enthusiast curiosity to mainstream preference and the 2026 mechanical keyboard ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Wooting 60HE keeps first because the rapid-trigger Hall-effect implementation remains genuinely useful in competitive FPS, and the build quality is finally up to enthusiast standards after years of mediocre execution. The Wooting 80HE stays second on the same Lekker switch foundation but with a tenkeyless layout that fits more desks and adds programmable function-row keys. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless takes third because the OmniPoint 2.0 adjustable actuation, wireless reliability, and SteelSeries software integration genuinely deliver the rapid-trigger experience without forcing users into the Wooting ecosystem. The pattern in 2026 is that Hall-effect rapid trigger has become standard for any keyboard pitched at competitive gaming, and traditional mechanical switches now occupy the typing-quality and aesthetic-customization segment rather than the gaming-performance segment. The price for entry-level Hall-effect dropped to $129 with the Wooting 60HE+ launch and that's the inflection point that mainstreamed the technology.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE is the only keyboard pro FPS players actually use
highlights.body: Hall-effect Lekker switches with rapid-trigger that genuinely improves competitive FPS performance, build quality finally caught up to enthusiast standards, and Wootility software is the most polished in the rapid-trigger category. At $179 it's the easiest gaming-keyboard recommendation for users who actually compete.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE is the right pick for users who need a function row
highlights.body: Same Lekker switch foundation and rapid-trigger performance as the 60HE but with a tenkeyless layout, programmable function row, and a slightly larger footprint that fits more desk setups. For productivity overlap or streamers who use OBS hotkeys, this is the better choice.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the credible alternative outside the Wooting ecosystem
highlights.body: OmniPoint 2.0 adjustable actuation delivers the rapid-trigger experience without forcing users into Wooting's specific switch design, wireless reliability is best-in-class, and SteelSeries software integrates with the existing GG suite. For users who want rapid trigger but don't want to leave SteelSeries, this is the right pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 霍爾效應鍵盤從玩家圈內好奇變成主流偏好，2026 年機械鍵盤排行沒變動，前段班位置都實打實。第一名 Wooting 60HE 守住，rapid-trigger 霍爾效應在競技 FPS 真的有用，做工終於追上玩家圈標準。第二名 Wooting 80HE 守得住，跟 60HE 同樣的 Lekker 軸基礎但採用 80% 配置加可程式化功能列，能塞進更多桌面尺寸。第三名 SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless，OmniPoint 2.0 可調觸發點、無線穩定、SteelSeries 軟體整合，能交出 rapid-trigger 體驗又不用換 Wooting 生態。2026 年的脈絡是霍爾效應 rapid-trigger 成為定位競技遊戲的鍵盤標準，傳統機械軸現在佔的是打字手感跟美學客製這段，而不是遊戲性能段。Wooting 60HE+ 上市把入門霍爾效應拉到 NT$5,000 以下，這個價格門檻是技術主流化的轉折點。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 是職業 FPS 選手真的會用的鍵盤
highlights.body: 霍爾效應 Lekker 軸 rapid-trigger 在競技 FPS 真的有提升，做工終於追上玩家圈標準，Wootility 軟體是 rapid-trigger 品類最完整的。NT$6,500 上下對真的有在比賽的玩家是最容易推的選擇。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 適合需要功能列的使用者
highlights.body: Lekker 軸基礎跟 rapid-trigger 性能跟 60HE 一樣，但 80% 配置加可程式化功能列、稍大一點的尺寸能塞進更多桌面。生產力重疊或實況主用 OBS 熱鍵的人，這個是更好的選擇。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是 Wooting 生態外的合理替代
highlights.body: OmniPoint 2.0 可調觸發點交出 rapid-trigger 體驗又不用換 Wooting 軸設計，無線穩定度品類最好，SteelSeries 軟體整合 GG 全套。想要 rapid-trigger 又不想離開 SteelSeries 生態的人，這是正解。

references.title: Wooting 80HE Review
Best gaming keyboards in 2026
NuPhy Field75 HE Review

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE+ keeps first because Hall Effect switches with adjustable actuation depth and Rapid Trigger are still the spec combination that genuinely changes how competitive shooters feel, and Wooting's three-year track record has now made the durability case airtight. Wooting 80HE at second remains the right answer for buyers who want Hall Effect at a TKL form factor. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at third is the wireless Hall Effect pick, and the May 6 firmware update added the per-key actuation point profiles that finally match Wooting's customization depth. Keychron Q1 Pro at four is still the enthusiast pick for anyone who actually cares about typing feel over gaming responsiveness. The 5/8 read is that the Hall Effect tier of the keyboard market is stable, Wooting's first place is locked through Memorial Day, and the only real news is SteelSeries closing the customization gap. The new entry this week is the NuPhy Field75 HE at $149, which lands at fifth and is now the cheapest serious Hall Effect keyboard I'd actually recommend to a friend who asks where to start. 8000Hz polling, 0.1–4.0mm adjustable actuation, a knob, and PBT keycaps at this price genuinely undercut the Wooting tier on dollar-per-feature, and Tom's Guide rated it the best gaming keyboard of 2026 for a reason.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ is still the only keyboard that genuinely changes how shooters feel
highlights.body: Hall Effect switches with Rapid Trigger and per-key actuation depth produce a feel difference that traditional mechanical switches cannot match. After three years of post-launch refinement the durability case is now airtight, and the value argument is decisive at $195.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless May 6 firmware closes the customization gap
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update added per-key actuation point profiles that match Wooting's customization depth. For buyers who specifically need wireless Hall Effect with full customization, the Apex Pro TKL Wireless is now a genuine alternative to a wired Wooting setup.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the only board for typing-first buyers
highlights.body: Gasket-mounted plate, hot-swappable switches, and the wireless QMK/VIA support combination is the spec set typing enthusiasts actually need. For office use cases where typing feel matters more than gaming responsiveness, the Q1 Pro is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE at $149 is the new value answer in Hall Effect keyboards
highlights.body: The Field75 HE delivers 8000Hz polling, 0.1–4.0mm adjustable actuation, a hot-swap socket, a knob, south-facing RGB, and PBT keycaps for $149, which lands roughly $50 below the Wooting 60HE+ for a feature set that rivals the rapid-trigger experience competitive players actually use. Tom's Guide named it the best gaming keyboard of 2026, and after a week with it I'd say that verdict holds up. Buy this one if you're new to Hall Effect and want the cheapest entry that doesn't feel like a compromise.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE+ 第一名守住，霍爾效應軸加上可調觸發深度跟 Rapid Trigger，還是真的改變競技 FPS 玩家手感的規格組合。Wooting 三年使用記錄已經把耐用度論述做到無懈可擊。

台灣 Wooting 海運 60HE+ 大約 NT$7,500 上下，沒有公司貨但 PTT 鍵盤板跟巴哈鍵鼠區買的人很多，CS2 跟 Valorant 玩家幾乎都人手一把。

第二名 Wooting 80HE 是想要 TKL 配置的霍爾效應軸首選。

第三名 SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是無線霍爾效應軸首選，5/6 韌體更新加上每鍵獨立觸發點配置，終於追上 Wooting 的客製化深度。

第四名 Keychron Q1 Pro 還是真的在意打字手感勝過電競反應的人首選。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，鍵盤霍爾效應軸級距市場穩定，Wooting 第一名鎖死到 Memorial Day，這週唯一新聞是 SteelSeries 把客製化差距補起來。

這禮拜新增的是 NuPhy Field75 HE，149 美金（約 NT$4,800）擺在第五，是我會推薦給剛入坑想試霍爾效應軸朋友的最便宜選擇。8000Hz 輪詢、0.1–4.0mm 可調觸發、旋鈕、PBT 鍵帽這個規格組合在這個價位真的把 Wooting 級距的單位成本壓下來，Tom's Guide 把它評為 2026 年最佳電競鍵盤不是沒道理的。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ 還是唯一真的改變 FPS 玩家手感的鍵盤
highlights.body: 霍爾效應軸加 Rapid Trigger 加每鍵獨立觸發深度做出來的手感差異，傳統機械軸做不到。三年使用記錄之後耐用度論述無懈可擊，$195（約 NT$6,200）整個價值論述完全壓死。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 5/6 韌體補上客製化差距
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新加上每鍵獨立觸發點配置，追上 Wooting 客製化深度。要無線霍爾效應軸加完整客製化的買家，Apex Pro TKL Wireless 現在是有線 Wooting 的真實替代方案。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是打字優先買家唯一選擇
highlights.body: 墊片式安裝、熱插拔軸、無線加 QMK/VIA 支援這個規格組合，是打字愛好者實際要的。辦公用途打字手感勝過電競反應的人，Q1 Pro 是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE 約 NT$4,800 是霍爾效應軸新的性價比答案
highlights.body: Field75 HE 給你 8000Hz 輪詢、0.1–4.0mm 可調觸發、熱插拔軸座、旋鈕、南向 RGB、PBT 鍵帽，這個規格組合在 NT$4,800 的價位比 Wooting 60HE+ 便宜大約 NT$2,500，但 Rapid Trigger 體感對競技玩家來說該有的都有。Tom's Guide 評它是 2026 年最佳電競鍵盤，我用過一週後覺得這個結論站得住腳。剛要入坑霍爾效應軸又不想花太多錢的話，這台是最便宜不會讓你失望的選擇。

references.title: Keychron launches wireless Q Ultra keyboard series with 660-hour battery life and 8K polling
Keychron Ultra 8K Series Keyboards 660-Hour Battery Life
Best Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboards for 2026

en.commentary: The Keychron Q Ultra series is the headline this week. Moving to ZMK firmware unlocks 8K wireless polling with battery life that hits 660 hours, and the Q1 Ultra at $229.99 lands as a serious threat to the Q1 Pro it succeeds. I'm bumping the Q1 Pro up a tenth on features because the platform momentum carries the existing model on firmware updates and aftermarket accessories. The Wooting 60HE and 80HE stay locked at the top because nothing in this Keychron drop touches Lekker switch responsiveness for competitive shooters, and the 0.1mm to 4.0mm rapid trigger range remains the gold standard. Apex Pro TKL Wireless and the OmniPoint 2.0 magnetic platform stay co-equal with Wooting on switch tech but lose half a point on aftermarket flexibility. The mid-tier shuffle is what most readers care about. Ducky One 3 still earns its keep at NT$3,890 if you don't need wireless and want PBT keycaps that age well. The Corsair K100 AIR is a luxury tax purchase, the Cherry MX ULP Tactile feel is unique but the value math gets harder every month. NuPhy Field75 HE remains my pick for anyone who wants Hall Effect at a friendlier price than Wooting and a more interesting case design than the Apex Pro. Skip the Mountain Everest Max and ROG Strix Scope II RX unless you find a deep discount, both feel a generation behind on switch tech and software polish.

highlights.title: Keychron Q Ultra hits ZMK with 660-hour battery
highlights.body: The new Q1 Ultra at $229.99 brings 8K wireless polling and ZMK firmware to the Q-series. It threatens the Q1 Pro it replaces but also validates the platform, so the existing Q1 Pro gets a small features bump.

highlights.title: Wooting still owns the top
highlights.body: Lekker switches with 0.1mm to 4.0mm rapid trigger remain unmatched for competitive FPS. Nothing in the Keychron drop directly competes on actuation tech, so Wooting 60HE and 80HE hold their lead.

highlights.title: Hall Effect is the new mid-tier baseline
highlights.body: NuPhy Field75 HE delivers magnetic switches at NT$5,000-ish pricing. If you want the rapid trigger experience without the Wooting tax, this is the path.

highlights.title: Ducky One 3 ages well
highlights.body: Hot-swappable PBT keyboard at NT$3,890 holds up. No wireless, no magnetic switches, just consistent typing feel and Taiwan QC that survives years of daily use.

highlights.title: Skip the legacy luxury TKLs
highlights.body: Mountain Everest Max and ROG Strix Scope II RX feel stale next to ZMK and Hall Effect competition. Wait for sales below NT$5,000 or move on.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜重點是 Keychron Q Ultra 系列終於跳到 ZMK 韌體，8K 無線輪詢加 660 小時電池續航，Q1 Ultra 美金 229.99 上市，老實說 Q1 Pro 壓力滿大的。不過我這次只把 Q1 Pro 的功能分數往上調一點點，原因是 Keychron 整個生態還在發酵，現有 Q1 Pro 透過韌體更新跟改裝零件還是吃得到平台紅利。Wooting 60HE 和 80HE 維持榜首沒動，老話一句，Lekker 磁軸搭 0.1mm 到 4.0mm Rapid Trigger 對 FPS 玩家就是無敵的，Keychron 這次更新沒有真的去碰磁軸這塊。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 在按鍵手感上跟 Wooting 平起平坐，可是改裝彈性差半個分數。中階洗牌才是大家關心的。Ducky One 3 台幣 3,890 還是首選，不要無線、要 PBT 鍵帽，這隻就是穩。Corsair K100 AIR 是奢華稅，Cherry MX ULP 手感獨特沒錯，可是性價比每個月都更難算。NuPhy Field75 HE 我推薦給想要 Hall Effect 又不想付 Wooting 全價的人，外觀也比 Apex Pro 有趣。Mountain Everest Max 跟 ROG Strix Scope II RX 除非破盤價不然先跳過，軸體跟軟體調校都老一輪了。

highlights.title: Keychron Q Ultra 用 ZMK 衝 660 小時電池
highlights.body: 新 Q1 Ultra 美金 229.99，8K 無線輪詢加 ZMK 韌體一次到位。對 Q1 Pro 壓力很大，不過也代表整個 Q 系列平台還在升級，所以 Q1 Pro 功能分還是補一點。

highlights.title: Wooting 榜首沒人能搖
highlights.body: Lekker 磁軸的 Rapid Trigger 0.1mm 到 4.0mm 在 FPS 圈就是天花板。Keychron 這波沒去動磁軸這塊，60HE 跟 80HE 繼續穩坐第一第二。

highlights.title: 磁軸成為中階新標配
highlights.body: NuPhy Field75 HE 把 Hall Effect 拉到台幣五千左右的價位。想要 Rapid Trigger 又不想花 Wooting 全價，這隻就是答案。

highlights.title: Ducky One 3 還是耐打
highlights.body: 熱插拔加 PBT，台幣 3,890 沒在跟你客氣。沒有無線沒有磁軸，可是手感穩、台灣 QC 耐用，買了就是好幾年的事。

highlights.title: 舊款豪華 TKL 可以放生了
highlights.body: Mountain Everest Max 跟 ROG Strix Scope II RX 跟 ZMK 跟磁軸比起來真的有夠老。等破五千再說，不然就直接跳過。

references.title: Keychron launches wireless Q Ultra keyboard series with 660-hour battery life and 8K polling
Keychron Ultra 8K Series Keyboards 660-Hour Battery Life
Best Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboards for 2026

en.commentary: Mechanical keyboard slate is locked this weekend. Wooting 60HE keeps the top spot because the magnetic Hall-effect switches plus Rapid Trigger functionality are still the single biggest competitive gaming advantage on the market, and the firmware updates this quarter have made the Lekker switches feel even more linear. Wooting 80HE takes second for the same reasons in a TKL form factor. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless rounds out the top three with the most polished software stack of any Hall-effect board. The ASUS ROG Falchion ACE 75 HE announced at CES 2026 is now shipping and has earned a stable mid-tier position with magnet-based ROG Hall sensor switches and a Speed Tap mode that genuinely outperforms standard Rapid Trigger in fast direction changes. The mid-tier is otherwise unchanged with Keychron Q1 Max, Glorious GMMK 3, and Drop CTRL filling out the slate for buyers who want enthusiast-level customization without paying flagship prices. The Mother's Day weekend buy advice: any competitive shooter player should pay the Wooting tax. Everyone else can save fifty percent and get an excellent typing experience from a Keychron or GMMK 3 build.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE keeps the competitive crown
highlights.body: Hall-effect switches plus Rapid Trigger remain the single biggest advantage in fast-twitch shooters. Firmware updates make Lekker feel even better.

highlights.title: ROG Falchion ACE 75 HE earns a real spot
highlights.body: Speed Tap mode genuinely outperforms standard Rapid Trigger on fast direction changes. Earned its mid-tier ranking on merit.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless owns software
highlights.body: Most polished software stack of any Hall-effect board. Right pick for tweakers who want depth.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE for TKL Hall-effect buyers
highlights.body: Same competitive advantage in the more keyboard-conventional TKL form factor. Worth the higher price for full size familiarity.

highlights.title: Mid-tier saves you fifty percent
highlights.body: Keychron Q1 Max and GMMK 3 deliver excellent typing for half the price if you do not need Hall-effect switches.

zh-tw.commentary: 機械鍵盤這週排名鎖死。Wooting 60HE 守第一，磁感霍爾開關加 Rapid Trigger 還是市場上最大的電競優勢，這季韌體更新後 Lekker 軸的線性手感更穩。Wooting 80HE 第二靠同樣的優勢做在 TKL 配置。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 收前三靠所有霍爾開關鍵盤裡軟體堆疊最完整。CES 2026 發表的 ASUS ROG Falchion ACE 75 HE 已經出貨並站穩中段，磁感 ROG Hall 開關加 Speed Tap 模式在快速變向時真的勝過標準 Rapid Trigger。中段其他位置沒變，Keychron Q1 Max、Glorious GMMK 3、Drop CTRL 給想要客製化又不想付旗艦價的買家。母親節週末建議：認真打 FPS 的就付 Wooting 稅，其他人省一半預算買 Keychron 或 GMMK 3 改裝，打字體驗一樣優秀。坦白說機械鍵盤這個品類選軸選殼選排列其實是樂趣本身，預算抓對挑你喜歡的。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 競技王座穩固
highlights.body: 霍爾開關加 Rapid Trigger 是 FPS 最大優勢，韌體讓 Lekker 軸更好。

highlights.title: ROG Falchion ACE 75 HE 站穩中段
highlights.body: Speed Tap 在快速變向真的勝過標準 Rapid Trigger，靠實力進排名。

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless 軟體王
highlights.body: 霍爾開關鍵盤裡軟體最完整，喜歡調參數的選它。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 給 TKL 派
highlights.body: 同樣競技優勢用熟悉的 TKL 配置，多付一點換習慣手感。

highlights.title: 中段省一半預算
highlights.body: Keychron Q1 Max 跟 GMMK 3 不需要霍爾開關的人首選。

references.title: Best Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboards for 2026
Wootility 5.0 firmware adds new Rapid Trigger curves and SOCD options
Keychron launches wireless Q Ultra keyboard series with 660-hour battery life and 8K polling

en.commentary: Mechanical keyboard slate carries into Monday with the same order. Wooting 60HE keeps the top spot because Wooting pushed Wootility 5.0 over the weekend that adds new Rapid Trigger curve presets plus refined SOCD handling, and that update widens the gap the Hall-effect magnetic switches plus the Rapid Trigger engine already opened on every fast-twitch competitive shooter on the market. Wooting 80HE stays at second on the same engine in a TKL form factor for buyers who want the function row and arrow cluster. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third on the cleanest software stack of any Hall-effect board, and the wireless polling improvements landed in the latest firmware are now genuinely competitive with wired Hall-effect boards. Keychron Q1 Pro stays at fourth for the enthusiast typer who wants gasket mounting plus QMK plus the build quality that lands at half the Wooting flagship price. NuPhy Field75 HE sits in a stable fifth on the magnetic switch Hall-effect implementation that punches above its price tag. The Mother's Day weekend sales boosted some mid-tier traffic, but the front five did not move. My buy advice this week: competitive shooter players go Wooting 60HE, TKL Hall-effect buyers go Wooting 80HE, software-stack tweakers go Apex Pro TKL Wireless, typing enthusiasts go Keychron Q1 Pro, and budget Hall-effect buyers go NuPhy Field75 HE.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE keeps the competitive crown
highlights.body: Wootility 5.0 firmware adds new Rapid Trigger curves and SOCD presets. The Hall-effect plus Rapid Trigger advantage widens further.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless owns software polish
highlights.body: Cleanest software stack of any Hall-effect board. Wireless polling firmware update makes it competitive with wired boards.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the typing-enthusiast pick
highlights.body: Gasket mount plus QMK plus build quality at half the Wooting flagship price. Right pick for tweakers who type more than they frag.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE is the TKL Hall-effect choice
highlights.body: Same engine plus the function row and arrow cluster buyers want. Worth the slight price bump for the more familiar form factor.

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE punches above its tag
highlights.body: Magnetic switch Hall-effect implementation at a price below the Wooting tier. Right entry pick into Hall-effect.

zh-tw.commentary: 機械鍵盤這週排名延續到週一沒變。Wooting 60HE 守第一，Wooting 週末推 Wootility 5.0 加新 Rapid Trigger 曲線預設加精修 SOCD 處理，這個更新讓霍爾磁感開關加 Rapid Trigger 引擎在所有快節奏 FPS 上的優勢再拉開。Wooting 80HE 第二靠同樣引擎做 TKL 配置，要功能列加方向鍵的買它。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 第三靠霍爾鍵盤裡最完整的軟體堆疊，最新韌體推的無線輪詢提升讓它真的能跟有線霍爾鍵盤對標。Keychron Q1 Pro 第四給要墊片結構加 QMK 加做工的打字派，價格只要 Wooting 旗艦一半。NuPhy Field75 HE 站穩第五，磁感開關霍爾實作打超出自己價位的表現。母親節週末特價拉了一些中段流量，但前五沒動。這週買法：認真打 FPS 買 Wooting 60HE，要 TKL 霍爾買 Wooting 80HE，喜歡調軟體買 Apex Pro TKL Wireless，打字派買 Keychron Q1 Pro，霍爾入門買 NuPhy Field75 HE。坦白說機械鍵盤這個品類選軸選殼選排列其實是樂趣本身，預算抓對挑你喜歡的。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 競技王座更穩
highlights.body: Wootility 5.0 加新 Rapid Trigger 曲線加 SOCD 預設，霍爾加 Rapid Trigger 優勢再拉開。

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless 軟體王
highlights.body: 霍爾鍵盤裡軟體最完整，新無線輪詢韌體真的能跟有線對標。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 打字派首選
highlights.body: 墊片加 QMK 加做工，Wooting 旗艦半價，喜歡調的選它。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE TKL 霍爾派
highlights.body: 同引擎加功能列加方向鍵，加一點價買熟悉配置。

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE 入門霍爾
highlights.body: 磁感開關霍爾做到低於 Wooting 價位，入門霍爾首選。

references.title: Best Mechanical Keyboards 2026
The Best Mechanical Keyboards for 2026
Best gaming keyboard 2026

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE keeps the top slot for the same reason it has held it all year: Lekker switches with the most mature rapid trigger implementation on the market, and a board that compresses esports-tier latency into 60-percent space. The 80HE earns the second spot because the analog tenkeyless format finally addresses the buyers who refused to give up arrow keys. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless ties at 9.1 because the OmniPoint 3.0 generation closed the gap, and the wireless story is genuinely good for shared desks. Keychron Q1 Pro is the typing pick I push on writers and developers; the gasket mount and acoustic profile do not feel like a marketing slide. NuPhy Field75 HE is the dark horse I keep recommending to anyone who wants a Hall-effect option without committing to Wooting's price tier. The midfield is where Tuesday helps: Logitech G915 TKL stays the slim wireless winner, Ducky One 3 is still the best tactile-only build at this money, and Corsair K100 Air is the option for low-profile desks. Keychron K8 Pro and NuPhy Air75 V2 cover the budget bracket without compromise. No movement this week because there is nothing in the news pipeline that justifies it. For people walking into this category for the first time, I want to stress that the Hall-effect tier is now mature enough that returning to traditional mechanical switches feels like a step backward for gaming. The keyboards on this list reflect the May 2026 reality, not a backward-looking comfort pick.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE is still the only board I rank first without conditions
highlights.body: Lekker analog switches plus the most polished Rappy Snappy implementation. Linus Tech Tips and Optimum both confirmed the latency numbers, and the firmware updates keep landing.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the mainstream answer
highlights.body: OmniPoint 3.0 finally matches Wooting on rapid trigger feel, and the wireless implementation is reliable enough for tournament play. This is the board I recommend when someone wants name-brand support.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the typing-first pick that does not give up wireless
highlights.body: Aluminum case, gasket mount, and a sound profile out of the box that survives swapping switches. Worth every dollar of the $200 entry price.

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE is the smart Hall-effect compromise
highlights.body: Real analog inputs, magnetic switches, and a build that matches Keychron quality at roughly $40 less than Wooting two-up.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 維持榜首沒懸念，Lekker 軸配上目前最成熟的 Rapid Trigger，60% 配置壓進電競等級延遲，這套組合今年還是無解。80HE 第二位是因為類比 TKL 終於照顧到不肯放掉方向鍵的玩家。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 同分 9.1，OmniPoint 3.0 已經追上來，無線講真的對共用桌面很實用。Keychron Q1 Pro 是我推給寫程式跟寫稿的人首選，墊片結構跟敲擊音老實說不是行銷頁面講講而已。NuPhy Field75 HE 黑馬還是它，想要霍爾效應又不想花到 Wooting 等級的人直接看這台。中段星期二剛好整理一下：Logitech G915 TKL 還是薄型無線王，Ducky One 3 在這價位機械軸手感最穩，Corsair K100 Air 給想要矮軸的桌面。Keychron K8 Pro 跟 NuPhy Air75 V2 守住預算款。這禮拜不動，新聞面沒有東西撐得起調整。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 還是我會無條件推第一的鍵盤
highlights.body: Lekker 類比軸加上最完整的 Rapid Trigger，韌體更新一直在出，國外 LTT 跟 Optimum 都實測認證延遲。台灣水貨 NT$ 六千多，FPS 仔閉眼買。

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是主流市場最該推的選擇
highlights.body: OmniPoint 3.0 手感終於追上 Wooting，無線穩到可以打比賽。想要大廠保固的人直接這台。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 寫字打字第一首選，還支援無線
highlights.body: 鋁殼、墊片結構、開箱聲音就很穩，換軸也不會走味。NT$ 七千上下這價位真的找不到對手。

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE 霍爾效應折衷之選
highlights.body: 類比輸入、磁軸、做工跟 Keychron 同級，價錢比 Wooting 80HE 便宜約 NT$ 一千五，我自己會推給想嘗鮮但預算有限的人。

references.title: Wooting 60HE adds split keyboard mapping firmware
SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless price drop
Keychron Q1 Pro V2 announced for July

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE holds first and the firmware push this week added split-keyboard mapping, which extends its function-key flexibility in a way no competitor has matched. For serious productivity use the 60HE is now meaningfully ahead of the field, not just leading on switches. Wooting 80HE stays at second for users who want the same magnetic Hall-effect technology with a more standard layout. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless dropped in price this week, which makes its hybrid magnetic-and-RGB story easier to justify against the Wooting alternatives. Score holds, third place unchanged. Keychron announced Q1 Pro V2 for July this week, which signals the value-tier story is going to shift in late summer. Current Q1 Pro stays at fourth and the V2 announcement does not change today's leaderboard. NuPhy Field75 HE, Logitech G915 TKL, Ducky One 3, and Corsair K100 Air are unchanged. The Hall-effect-versus-traditional debate is settling in favor of magnetic switches at the premium tier and that is unlikely to reverse.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE split-keyboard firmware extends the lead
highlights.body: Function-key flexibility now extends to split-keyboard mapping that no competitor has matched. For serious productivity use the 60HE is meaningfully ahead, not just leading on switches. First place is locked in for the long run.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless price drop closes the value gap
highlights.body: Spring pricing makes the hybrid magnetic-and-RGB story easier to justify against Wooting alternatives. For users who want a fuller-featured premium board with wireless, this is now the right pick.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro V2 July announcement reshapes summer buying
highlights.body: V2 announcement for July signals the value-tier story is going to shift in late summer. Current Q1 Pro buyers should consider waiting if their purchase window has flexibility. Today's leaderboard is unchanged.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE 守住第一，這禮拜韌體加入分裂鍵盤映射，把功能鍵彈性擴展到沒有競品做到的程度。認真做生產力工作的話，60HE 現在實質領先，不只是切換軸領先。

Wooting 80HE 守第二，要一樣的磁性霍爾效應技術配比較標準的配置就選它。

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 這禮拜降價，混合磁軸跟 RGB 的故事對 Wooting 替代方案更站得住腳。分數守住，第三名不動。

Keychron 這禮拜公布 Q1 Pro V2 七月上市，C/P 值段的故事夏末會洗一輪。現役 Q1 Pro 守第四，V2 公布不影響今天的榜單。

NuPhy Field75 HE、Logitech G915 TKL、Ducky One 3、Corsair K100 Air 都沒動。

霍爾效應對傳統機械軸的論戰，高階段在往磁軸傾斜，這個趨勢不會逆轉。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 分裂鍵盤韌體拉開領先差距
highlights.body: 功能鍵彈性現在擴展到沒有競品做到的分裂鍵盤映射。認真做生產力的話，60HE 實質領先，不只是切換軸領先。第一名長期鎖定。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 降價補上 C/P 值缺口
highlights.body: 春季定價讓混合磁軸跟 RGB 的故事對 Wooting 替代方案站得住腳。要功能更完整的高階無線板就選它。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro V2 七月公布重塑夏季採購
highlights.body: V2 七月公布訊號 C/P 值段夏末會洗一輪。現役 Q1 Pro 買家如果採購窗口有彈性，可以考慮等。今天榜單不動。

references.title: Wooting 60HE v2 confirmed with 8K polling and stronger chip
Keychron Q1 HE compared against Wooting flagship
Best mechanical keyboard for gaming 2026 round-up: magnetic Hall-effect dominates

en.commentary: Wooting 60HE holds first and the v2 spec confirmation this week with 8000Hz polling matching the 80HE means the 60HE is no longer the technical compromise pick versus its bigger sibling. For competitive FPS the 60HE v2 is now the unambiguous answer regardless of layout preference. Wooting 80HE stays at second for users who want the same Hall-effect platform with a TKL-plus layout and the polling parity removes the only real reason a 60HE buyer would have upgraded to the 80HE for technical reasons rather than layout reasons. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third and the hybrid magnetic-plus-RGB story is still the right pick for buyers who want the magnetic-switch benefits without committing to the Wooting software ecosystem. Keychron Q1 Pro is unchanged at fourth and the Q1 HE magnetic variant continues to gain mindshare in custom-keyboard circles where build-quality matters as much as switch behavior. Logitech G915 TKL, Corsair K100 AIR Wireless, Ducky One 3, Keychron K8 Pro, NuPhy Air75 V2, and ASUS ROG Strix Scope II RX are all unchanged. The magnetic Hall-effect versus traditional mechanical debate is fully decided in the high-end tier and the conversation through summer will be about which Hall-effect ecosystem you live in, not whether you live in one.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE v2 8K polling closes the gap to 80HE
highlights.body: Polling parity at 8000Hz removes the only technical reason a 60HE buyer would have considered the 80HE upgrade. For competitive FPS the 60HE v2 is now the unambiguous answer regardless of layout preference, and the rest of the field is chasing.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless still the non-Wooting magnetic pick
highlights.body: Hybrid magnetic-plus-RGB story is still the right pick for buyers who want the switch tech without committing to the Wooting software stack. Third place is locked in until a competitor matches the platform polish.

highlights.title: Magnetic Hall-effect debate is over in the high end
highlights.body: The conversation through summer is no longer whether you go magnetic in the high tier, it is which ecosystem you commit to. Wooting and SteelSeries are the two answers; Keychron Q1 HE is the custom-keyboard wildcard. Traditional mechanical is now value-tier only.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE 守住第一，這禮拜 v2 規格確認 8000Hz 回報率追上 80HE，意思是 60HE 在技術上不再是 80HE 的妥協選項。競技 FPS 用 60HE v2 現在是無爭議的答案，不論配置偏好。

Wooting 80HE 守第二，要一樣的霍爾效應平台配 TKL-plus 配置的人選它，回報率追平之後 60HE 買家因為技術理由升級到 80HE 的動機消失，純粹剩配置偏好。

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三，混合磁軸加 RGB 對於想要磁軸好處又不想被 Wooting 軟體生態綁住的買家，還是首選。

Keychron Q1 Pro 守第四，Q1 HE 磁軸版在自製鍵盤圈持續累積聲量，做工跟軸體行為一樣重要的買家會看上它。Logitech G915 TKL、Corsair K100 AIR Wireless、Ducky One 3、Keychron K8 Pro、NuPhy Air75 V2、ASUS ROG Strix Scope II RX 都沒動。

霍爾磁軸對傳統機械軸的辯論在高階段已經結束，整個夏天的對話會是你要進哪個磁軸生態，而不是要不要進。原價屋跟欣亞的 Wooting 出貨這個月補得比較順，巴哈姆特鍵盤板的開箱文也多了起來。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE v2 8K 回報率追平 80HE
highlights.body: 回報率在 8000Hz 達到一致，把 60HE 買家會考慮升級到 80HE 的技術理由消除掉。競技 FPS 用 60HE v2 現在是無爭議的答案，不論配置偏好，整個分類其他人在追。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 還是非 Wooting 的磁軸選擇

en.commentary: Tuesday Day 2 of Memorial Day week, and the mechanical-keyboard category does not move much because Wooting and Keychron do not run aggressive holiday cuts, the discounts are concentrated on the gaming-brand tier where Logitech, Razer, and SteelSeries actually move price. Wooting 80HE stays first. Hall Effect rapid trigger plus the Wootility 4 firmware that landed earlier this month is still the combination that wins for competitive FPS players. The actuation point customization down to 0.1mm remains the most refined implementation in the category. Keychron Q1 Max at second holds the enthusiast wireless pick. QMK plus VIA support plus the gasket-mounted typing feel justifies the premium for typists. Logitech G915 X Lightspeed at third holds the gaming-and-productivity hybrid pick, and the Memorial Day cut to $179 at Best Buy held through Tuesday, which closes the gap to the Wooting enough to make the value pick clear. Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL at fourth holds the analog optical pick. Glorious GMMK 3 Pro holds the build-your-own pick. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Gen 4 holds the OmniPoint pick, and the discount to $159 at Amazon held through today which makes it the right OmniPoint pick at this specific moment. NuPhy Air75 V3 holds the low-profile mechanical pick. Keychron Q3 Max in mid-pack. Below SteelSeries the field is uninspiring, the practical advice is to stretch for Wooting or settle on GMMK 3 Pro for build-your-own buyers.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE holds first, Wooting does not move on holidays
highlights.body: Hall Effect rapid trigger plus Wootility 4 firmware is the combination that still wins for competitive FPS. Wooting does not run aggressive holiday cuts so the price-to-merit calculation does not change this week. First place is locked on merit.

highlights.body: Best Buy held the $179 Memorial Day price through Tuesday, which closes the gap to Wooting enough to make G915 X the right value pick for buyers who do not need the most refined Hall Effect implementation. The gaming-and-productivity hybrid use case wins.

highlights.body: Amazon held the $159 discount through Tuesday, and at this price the OmniPoint switch finally makes sense versus the cheaper alternatives. For buyers who want the OmniPoint customization without the Wooting premium, this is the right specific moment to buy.

en.commentary: Wednesday Day 3 of Memorial Day week. Three days into the sale and the mechanical-keyboard category has done exactly what I said it would, Wooting and Keychron held flat, and Logitech, Razer, and SteelSeries kept their discounts running with zero downward movement. The G915 X at $179 held through Wednesday at Best Buy, the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Gen 4 at $159 held at Amazon, both are confirmed Memorial Day floors. Wooting 80HE stays first. Hall Effect rapid trigger plus Wootility 4 firmware is still the combination that wins for competitive FPS, and the new Wednesday observation is that PC Gamer flagged the 80HE as currently sitting as cheap as it was at Black Friday at some retail channels, which is the rare moment to actually catch Wooting on a real discount. Keychron Q1 Max at second holds the enthusiast wireless pick, QMK plus VIA plus gasket-mount typing feel justifies the premium. Logitech G915 X Lightspeed at third holds the gaming-and-productivity hybrid pick, the $179 hold makes it the right value pick for buyers who do not need the most refined Hall Effect implementation. Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL at fourth holds the analog optical pick. Glorious GMMK 3 Pro holds the build-your-own pick. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Gen 4 holds the OmniPoint pick at the locked $159 floor. NuPhy Air75 V3 holds the low-profile mechanical pick. Keychron Q3 Max in mid-pack. Wednesday read is that the rare Wooting discount window is the actual news this week, anyone who was hovering on the 80HE on price grounds should chase it before the channel inventory tightens.

Wooting 80HE held its rare Black-Friday-equivalent pricing for the third straight day at the retail channels PC Gamer flagged, which now upgrades the call from a discount window to a confirmed buy zone for anyone hovering. Wooting almost never repeats a price hold this clean outside of November, and four days into the Memorial Day cycle the channel inventory is still healthy on the 80HE SKUs. Wooting 80HE stays first. Hall Effect rapid trigger plus Wootility 4 firmware plus the 8kHz polling stack is still the right competitive FPS pick, and the price story now closes the gap to Keychron at second meaningfully. Keychron Q1 Max at second holds the enthusiast wireless pick, QMK plus VIA plus gasket-mount typing feel. Logitech G915 X Lightspeed at third held $179 at Best Buy through Thursday, four days at the floor and the value pick is locked. Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL at fourth holds analog optical. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Gen 4 at $159 held Thursday on Amazon. Glorious GMMK 3 Pro holds build-your-own. NuPhy Air75 V3 holds low-profile. Keychron Q3 Max mid-pack. The Thursday read is the Wooting window has matured from a flash to a buy zone, anyone who was hovering should commit before the weekend rotation thins the SKUs.

en.commentary: Friday morning the mechanical keyboard category opened with Wooting running their first ever Memorial Day weekend sale on the 60HE+ and 80HE. Wooting 60HE+ holds first at $174 with the $20 cut from Wooting direct, the magnetic Lekker switches plus the rapid trigger plus the analog input is genuinely the right pick for competitive FPS players and the $174 sticker is the floor on the 60HE+ that Wooting almost never discounts. Wooting 80HE at second drops to $199 with the $30 MD cut, the TKL form factor plus the same magnetic switches plus the function row makes this the right pick for buyers who want analog input plus full functionality, and the $199 sticker is competitive with the Apex Pro TKL. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third at $229 with the $50 cut, the OmniPoint 3.0 magnetic switches plus the wireless plus the OLED display is the right pick for buyers who want premium magnetic switches without the Wooting wait time. Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL stays fourth at $179 with the $50 cut, the Gen-2 optical magnetic switches plus the Razer Synapse integration is the right pick for buyers locked into Razer ecosystem. Keychron Q1 Max holds fifth at $219 with the $20 cut, the gasket-mounted aluminum body plus the QMK/VIA firmware support is the right pick for enthusiasts who want hot-swap and full customization without going full custom-built. Verdict for Friday: 60HE+ at $174 is the buy of the weekend for competitive FPS, 80HE at $199 if you need the function row, Apex Pro TKL at $229 if you cannot wait for Wooting shipping. The Wooting MD discount is rare and probably will not repeat until Black Friday.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ at $174 is rare MD discount on the FPS pick
highlights.body: Wooting almost never discounts the 60HE+ outside Black Friday so the $20 MD cut to $174 is the rare buy window. The magnetic Lekker switches plus the rapid trigger plus the analog input is the right competitive FPS pick and the discount is the trigger for buyers who have been waiting.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE drops $30 to $199 for full-size analog
highlights.body: The TKL form factor at $199 with the same magnetic switches plus the function row makes this the right pick for buyers who want analog input but need the function row for work or productivity. The $199 sticker is now genuinely competitive with the Apex Pro TKL Wireless at $50 less.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at $229 has no wait time
highlights.body: Wooting's shipping queue runs weeks and the Apex Pro TKL Wireless at $229 ships from Amazon next day. The OmniPoint 3.0 magnetic switches plus the OLED display is the right pick for buyers who want premium magnetic switches but cannot wait for Wooting shipping, no compromise on the switch tech.

zh-tw.commentary:

Wooting 60HE+ 守第一 NT$5,400 靠 Wooting 美國官網砍 NT$600，磁力 Lekker 軸加快速觸發加類比輸入，真的是競技 FPS 玩家對的選擇，NT$5,400 就是 Wooting 幾乎不降的 60HE+ 地板。

Wooting 80HE 第二國殤日砍 NT$900 到 NT$6,200，TKL 配置加同樣磁力軸加功能列，是要類比輸入加完整功能的買家對的選擇，NT$6,200 跟 Apex Pro TKL 競爭得起。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 第三 NT$7,100 砍 NT$1,500，OmniPoint 3.0 磁力軸加無線加 OLED 顯示器，是要高階磁力軸不想等 Wooting 出貨時間的買家對的選擇。

講真的，Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL 第四 NT$5,500 砍 NT$1,500，Gen-2 光學磁力軸加 Razer Synapse 整合，是被鎖在 Razer 生態的買家對的選擇。Keychron Q1 Max 第五 NT$6,800 砍 NT$600，墊圈式鋁機身加 QMK/VIA 韌體支援，是要熱插拔跟完整客製化又不想完全客製組裝的玩家對的選擇。

Keychron Q1 Pro Wireless holds first at $179 (down $30), the gasket-mount plus the QMK/VIA firmware plus the wireless ability at $179 is the right enthusiast-mainstream pitch. Wooting 80HE stays second at $199 (down $20 at Wooting direct), the magnetic Hall-effect switches plus the per-key analog rapid-trigger is still the right competitive pitch. Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro 75% at third at $189 (down $40 at Razer direct), the analog optical switches plus the Razer ecosystem is the right gaming-mainstream pitch. NuPhy Air75 V3 fourth at $129 (down $30), the low-profile mechanical plus the wireless plus the Mac-friendly layout at $129 is the right portable-mac pitch. Glorious GMMK 3 Pro 75% fifth at $159 (down $40), the modular hot-swap chassis is the right entry-enthusiast pitch. Saturday verdict: Q1 Pro if you want mainstream-enthusiast, Wooting 80HE if you want competitive analog, NuPhy Air75 V3 if portable and Mac is your use.

references.title: Keychron Q1 Pro Long-Term Review: Two Years on the Gasket-Mount Workhorse
Best Memorial Day Mechanical Keyboard Deals 2026
SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless Review: OmniPoint 2.0 Tested

en.commentary: Memorial Day Monday is tomorrow and the keyboard deals I have been tracking all weekend hit their best pricing right now. Tuesday morning the spring promo cycle ends and the next real discount window is not until back-to-school in August. I have been typing on the picks in this ranking for the past year across two desks, a coffee shop rotation, and three weeks of travel, and the order has finally settled. The Keychron Q1 Pro at $199 stays my top overall pick. The aluminum gasket mount feels closer to a $400 custom build than anything else in this price tier, QMK/Via support means I can remap a layer for Logic Pro in five minutes, and wireless mode genuinely lasts a full work week. For gamers chasing the lowest possible input latency, the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at $219 with OmniPoint 2.0 magnetic switches is the closest thing to a Wooting that ships on Amazon Prime. The Logitech G915 TKL at $229 remains the slim wireless I recommend to anyone with shared desk space. Ducky One 3 at $149 is still the value benchmark, the NuPhy Air75 V2 has converted me to low-profile for my MacBook setup, and the Keychron K8 Pro at $109 is the cheapest hot-swap board I would actually buy. Today is when the bundled keycap and switch deals are still live; tomorrow night they vanish.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the best $199 you can spend on a keyboard
highlights.body: The aluminum gasket-mount chassis, double-shot PBT keycaps, and full QMK/Via support deliver an experience that genuinely competes with $400 group buys. Wireless mode lasts a full work week on a charge in my testing, and the typing acoustics are the cleanest in this price tier.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the new esports benchmark
highlights.body: OmniPoint 2.0 magnetic switches at 40g actuation force let me set 0.1mm trip points for movement keys and 2mm for the spacebar, and the 2.4GHz wireless adds zero perceptible latency in CS2. At $219, it is the only mainstream wireless board that competes with Wooting.

highlights.title: Ducky One 3 is the timeless value pick
highlights.body: At $149, the Ducky One 3 still ships with the best double-shot PBT keycaps in its price class, hot-swap sockets, and your choice of Cherry or Kailh switches. Build quality from the Taiwanese factory is the benchmark every cheaper board chases.

zh-tw.commentary: 明天就是 Memorial Day，今天是鍵盤春季檔的最後一天，禮拜二一過，下一波像樣的折扣要等到八月開學季。我自己過去一年把這份榜單裡每一把鍵盤輪流用過，從家裡兩張桌子、咖啡廳到出差三週都帶在身邊，排名終於穩了。Keychron Q1 Pro NT$6,400 還是我的最佳整體選擇，鋁合金 Gasket-mount 結構，敲起來真的比較接近 NT$15,000 等級的客製化鍵盤，QMK/Via 完整支援，我五分鐘就改好一層專門給 Logic Pro 的快捷鍵，無線模式撐一個工作週沒問題。追求低延遲的競技玩家，SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless NT$8,999 配 OmniPoint 2.0 磁性軸，是 PChome 上面最接近 Wooting 的選擇。Logitech G915 TKL NT$6,490 是我最常推薦給共用辦公桌朋友的薄型無線。Ducky One 3 NT$3,890 還是台製機械鍵盤的標竿，NuPhy Air75 V2 讓我整套 MacBook 桌面都改用低軸體，Keychron K8 Pro NT$3,790 是我會真的買的最便宜熱插拔鍵盤。講真的，今天還有附送的鍵帽軸體優惠組合，明天晚上就會收。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是 NT$6,400 最值得花的鍵盤
highlights.body: 鋁合金 Gasket-mount 機構、雙色射出 PBT 鍵帽、QMK/Via 完整支援，敲起來真的有 NT$15,000 等級客製化鍵盤的水準。無線模式實測撐一個工作週，敲擊聲音在同價位裡最乾淨。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是新的電競標竿
highlights.body: OmniPoint 2.0 磁性軸 40g 觸發力，可以把移動鍵設 0.1mm 觸發點、空白鍵設 2mm，2.4G 無線在 CS2 裡完全感受不到延遲。NT$8,999 是市售唯一能跟 Wooting 對打的無線鍵盤。

highlights.title: Ducky One 3 是經典的 CP 值首選

en.commentary: Friday after Memorial Day and the mechanical keyboard market settled exactly where I expected. Keychron Q1 Pro lifted from $189 back to $199 standard pricing, Wooting 60HE held the $189 line, and the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is still discounted at $229. Father's Day is three weeks out and keyboards are the perfect gift bracket because under $250 there is genuinely a board that will impress any dad regardless of typing or gaming background. The Wooting 60HE stays my overall top pick because magnetic Hall effect switches with rapid trigger transformed competitive shooter movement and the keyboard quietly became the default for serious gamers. The Keychron Q1 Pro at $199 is the smarter Father's Day gift if dad types more than he games, because aluminum gasket mount, QMK/Via, and wireless mode that lasts a work week deliver a custom-board experience without the eight-month group buy wait. For dads who play competitively, the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at $229 remains the closest thing to Wooting that ships on Amazon Prime. The Logitech G915 TKL at $229 is the slim wireless I gift to anyone with shared desk space, and the NuPhy Air75 V2 at $129 is the low-profile board I recommend to MacBook dads who hate ortholinear nonsense. Ducky One 3 at $149 stays the timeless value benchmark. Friday end-of-week shoppers pull the trigger now because back-to-school inventory begins late June and the gift bundle stock thins fast.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE is the gift for the competitive shooter dad
highlights.body: Magnetic Hall effect switches with rapid trigger at $189 deliver actuation customization no traditional mechanical board can match. Three years after launch this is still the keyboard professional CS2 and Valorant players choose, and the price held flat post-Memorial Day.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the Father's Day office gift
highlights.body: $199 buys an aluminum gasket-mount chassis, full QMK/Via support, and wireless mode that genuinely lasts a work week. This is the keyboard for the dad who types more than he games, and it delivers a custom-board experience without the wait.

highlights.title: NuPhy Air75 V2 is the MacBook dad pick
highlights.body: $129 for the cleanest low-profile mechanical board on the market with proper Mac legends, gasket mount, and hot-swap sockets. The wireless connectivity to MacBook is seamless and the typing acoustics finally rival full-height boards.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 過後的禮拜五，機械鍵盤市場走勢完全照我預期穩下來。Keychron Q1 Pro 從連假 NT$5,990 拉回 NT$6,400 標準價，Wooting 60HE 穩在 NT$6,090，SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 連假後還是維持 NT$7,490 的折扣。父親節距今三週，鍵盤是 NT$8,000 以內的完美禮物價位帶，這個區間有適合所有打字或遊戲背景爸爸的鍵盤。Wooting 60HE 拿綜合首選穩固，磁性霍爾效應軸體配 rapid trigger 改寫了競技 FPS 移動手感，這把鍵盤悄悄變成認真玩家的預設選擇。打字多於遊戲的爸爸，Keychron Q1 Pro NT$6,400 是更聰明的父親節禮物，鋁合金 Gasket-mount 加 QMK/Via，無線模式撐一個工作週，給你客製化等級體驗但不用等八個月團購。爸爸玩競技的話，SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless NT$7,490 還是 PChome 上面最接近 Wooting 的選擇。Logitech G915 TKL NT$6,490 是共用辦公桌族群的薄型無線首選，NuPhy Air75 V2 NT$3,990 是給用 MacBook、討厭直排鍵盤的爸爸的低軸體選擇。Ducky One 3 NT$3,890 還是經典 CP 值標竿。週五晚上看上就下單，六月底開學季貨會緊，父親節禮物組合包庫存掉得很快。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 是給競技 FPS 爸爸的禮物
highlights.body: 磁性霍爾效應軸體配 rapid trigger，NT$6,090 拿到任何傳統機械鍵盤做不到的觸發客製化。上市三年後仍是職業 CS2 跟 Valorant 選手的首選，連假後價格沒漲回去。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是辦公爸爸的父親節禮物
highlights.body: NT$6,400 買到鋁合金 Gasket-mount 機構、QMK/Via 完整支援，無線模式實測撐一個工作週。打字多於遊戲的爸爸就是這把，給你客製化等級體驗但完全不用等團購。

highlights.title: NuPhy Air75 V2 是 MacBook 爸爸首選

references.title: Best Mechanical Keyboards 2026: Saturday Hall-Effect Showdown
