en.commentary:
Saturday May 30 keeps Wooting 60HE at the top of the mechanical keyboard ranking because the Hall-effect switches with the Rapid Trigger and SOCD support remain the most complete competitive-gaming keyboard package in the category. At $189, the 60HE outperforms anything in the optical-switch bracket for FPS players, and the May firmware update tightened the Wootility software to the point where keyboard configuration is now genuinely intuitive rather than a learning curve.

Wooting 80HE holds second at $239 as the full-size variant for users who need function keys and a numpad. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third at $239 on the OmniPoint 3.0 adjustable actuation and the wireless freedom that the Wooting wired models cannot match. For dads who game and need a wireless keyboard for cleaner desk setups, Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the rational pick.

Keychron Q1 Pro holds fourth at $209 on the wireless mechanical with the customization depth that the QMK firmware ecosystem unlocks. For typist-first dads who want a wireless mechanical for office work plus light gaming, Q1 Pro is the right call. NuPhy Field75 HE holds fifth at $189 as the wireless Hall-effect alternative that competes with Wooting on switch technology. Saturday Father's Day gift orders are pulling the Wooting 60HE and the Keychron Q1 Pro into carts this week.

For FPS players, the 60HE outperforms anything in the optical-switch bracket. The May firmware update made Wootility configuration genuinely intuitive.

For dads who need numeric input for spreadsheets or accounting work plus FPS gaming, the 80HE is the rational pick over the 60HE. The shipping lead time from Wooting direct holds at 3 to 4 weeks for the in-stock variants.

For typist-first dads who want a wireless mechanical for office work plus light gaming, Q1 Pro is the right call over the SteelSeries Apex Pro because the build quality and the QMK depth exceed what gaming-first competitors offer.

Wooting 80HE 守第二 USD$239（NT$7,990）全尺寸版本，需要功能鍵跟數字鍵盤的使用者。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三 USD$239（NT$7,990），OmniPoint 3.0 可調觸發加 Wooting 有線機型沒有的無線自由。玩遊戲又需要無線鍵盤讓桌面乾淨的爸爸，Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是理性選擇。

Keychron Q1 Pro 守第四 USD$209（NT$6,990），無線機械加 QMK 韌體生態系解鎖的客製化深度。打字優先的爸爸想要無線機械做辦公加輕度遊戲，Q1 Pro 是正確選擇。NuPhy Field75 HE 守第五 USD$189（NT$6,290），無線霍爾效應替代可以在軸體技術跟 Wooting 競爭。星期六父親節禮物訂單這週把 Wooting 60HE 跟 Keychron Q1 Pro 拉進購物車。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE NT$6,290 是 FPS 競技父親節選擇

references.title: Best Mechanical Keyboard 2026: 7 Gaming Picks Tested
The 5 Best Mechanical Keyboards of 2026
Best Mechanical Keyboards in 2026

en.commentary: The Wooting 60HE is the keyboard that changed how competitive gaming peripherals are evaluated, and in 2026 it still sets the standard. Its Hall Effect magnetic switches deliver Rapid Trigger with 0.1mm resolution and analog input that no mechanical switch can replicate. The 9.8 switch and latency scores are the highest in this category and reflect genuine technical superiority rather than marketing specification inflation. The transition is real: as of April 2026, 40% of the top 2,252 tracked professional esports players have adopted Hall Effect or analog optical switch keyboards, up from essentially zero in 2022. The Wooting 80HE at rank two is the full-size variant with the same switch platform for players who need a numpad or prefer the layout for productivity. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at rank three is the mainstream answer: OmniPoint switches with adjustable actuation, wireless freedom, and a 9.0 build quality score that reflects robust aluminum construction. For buyers who prioritize typing feel alongside gaming performance, the Keychron Q1 Pro at rank four delivers a 9.5 build score with its gasket-mounted aluminum frame and pre-lubed switches. Its 9.0 value score makes it the recommendation in the premium typing-first tier. The NuPhy Field75 HE at rank five adds Hall Effect technology in a wireless 75% form factor, combining the competitive gaming features of the Wooting line with the portability that desk aesthetics-focused buyers prefer. Father's Day timing is bringing keyboards into gift consideration, and the Keychron K8 Pro and NuPhy Air75 V2 at ranks 10 and 11 represent the most giftable price points with strong value scores.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE Leads as Hall Effect Adoption Hits 40% of Pros
highlights.body: As of April 2026, 40% of the top professional esports players tracked use a Hall Effect or analog optical keyboard, a figure that was essentially zero in 2022. The Wooting 60HE drove this shift with Rapid Trigger and 0.1mm resolution actuation that traditional mechanical switches cannot match.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless Covers the Mainstream Competitive Tier
highlights.body: OmniPoint adjustable actuation switches, wireless 2.4GHz, and aluminum construction give the Apex Pro TKL Wireless a 9.0 build score and 9.5 latency score. It is the keyboard for competitive players who want proven technology from a widely available brand.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro Leads the Premium Typing-First Segment
highlights.body: Gasket-mounted aluminum frame, pre-lubed switches, and hot-swap capability produce a 9.5 build score and 9.0 value score that make the Q1 Pro the strongest typing-focused mechanical keyboard at its price point. The south-facing RGB eliminates shine-through interference on angled keycap sets.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 是那個改變競技鍵盤評估方式的產品，到了 2026 年依然是業界標準。霍爾效應磁性開關搭配 0.1mm 解析度的 Rapid Trigger，以及類比輸入功能，這些是任何傳統機械開關都無法複製的技術優勢。9.8 分的開關和延遲評分是本榜最高，背後是真實的技術領先，不是規格虛報。這個趨勢已經到達引爆點，2026 年 4 月的數據顯示，追蹤中的頂尖職業電競選手有 40% 使用霍爾效應或類比光學開關鍵盤，2022 年這個數字近乎零。Wooting 80HE 排名第二，同樣的開關平台配上含數字鍵盤的完整佈局，適合需要 Full Size 配置的玩家。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 排第三，是主流競技玩家的標準答案，可調式觸發點加無線自由度，9.0 分的製造品質反映扎實的鋁製外殼工藝。Keychron Q1 Pro 排第四，如果你打字和遊戲都在意，它的彈性安裝結構加上預潤滑開關帶來 9.5 分的製造品質，9.0 分的性價比在高端打字鍵盤中是非常合理的定位。NuPhy Field75 HE 排第五，把霍爾效應技術帶進無線 75% 鍵盤，兼顧競技功能和桌面美學。父親節旺季帶動鍵盤禮物需求，Keychron K8 Pro 和 NuPhy Air75 V2 的價位是最容易讓人點頭的禮物選擇。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 領銜，職業選手霍爾效應採用率達 40%
highlights.body: 2026 年 4 月數據：追蹤中的頂尖職業電競選手有 40% 改用霍爾效應或類比光學鍵盤，2022 年幾乎為零。Wooting 60HE 的 Rapid Trigger 和 0.1mm 解析度觸發是這波轉移的推手。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守住主流競技市場
highlights.body: OmniPoint 可調式觸發、2.4GHz 無線、鋁製外殼，帶來 9.0 分製造品質和 9.5 分延遲評分。對想用成熟技術和主流品牌的競技玩家而言是最無懸念的選擇。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是高端打字玩家的首選
highlights.body: 彈性安裝鋁框、預潤滑開關、熱插拔設計帶來 9.5 分製造品質和 9.0 分性價比，是這個價位段打字體驗最強的機械鍵盤。南向 RGB 設計消除對傾斜鍵帽組的透光干擾。

references.title: Best Hall effect keyboards in 2026: the fastest, most customizable keyboards for competitive gaming
Wooting 80HE Review 2026: 8KHz Hall Effect Gaming Keyboard Tested
Wooting 60HE & 80HE Guide: The Hall Effect Gaming Standard (2026)

en.commentary: June opens with the keyboard order holding, and Wooting still owns the front of the grid for one concrete reason. The Wooting 60HE keeps first because its Lekker Hall Effect switches with the most mature Rapid Trigger implementation cut counter-strafe time measurably, reviewers this year clocked roughly a 26 percent reduction versus traditional switches, from about 82ms down to 61ms. That is a real competitive edge in CS2 and Valorant, and it is why the 60HE remains the most popular board in the CS2 pro scene. The Wooting 80HE holds second, pushing 8000 Hz polling that approaches the physical limit of how fast a keypress can register, and the Wootility software is still the easiest analog tooling for a newcomer. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL stays third as the mainstream Hall Effect alternative with OmniPoint, Keychron Q1 Pro keeps fourth as the enthusiast build-quality and wireless pick. NuPhy Field75 HE at fifth remains the value Hall Effect entry that undercuts the Wootings without giving up rapid trigger. Nothing launched this week reorders the front, so the June verdict is steady. Wooting 60HE for competitive FPS, 80HE if you want the bigger layout and 8K polling, Apex Pro for the polished mainstream experience, Keychron Q1 Pro when you want a heavy custom-feel board with wireless.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE keeps the competitive crown on measured latency
highlights.body: Lekker Hall Effect switches with the most mature Rapid Trigger cut counter-strafe time roughly 26 percent, from about 82ms to 61ms in testing. That measurable edge in CS2 and Valorant keeps the 60HE first and the most popular board in the pro scene.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE pushes the polling ceiling at second
highlights.body: 8000 Hz polling approaches the physical limit of how fast a keypress can register, and the Wootility remains the easiest analog software for a newcomer. If you want the larger layout with the same rapid trigger pedigree, the 80HE is the pick.

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE is the value Hall Effect entry
highlights.body: Fifth overall and it undercuts both Wootings while keeping full rapid trigger support. For a player who wants analog magnetic switches without the flagship price, this is the smart on-ramp into Hall Effect gaming.

zh-tw.commentary:
六月開頭鍵盤排序守住，Wooting 還是稱霸前段，原因很具體。

Wooting 60HE 守第一，因為它的 Lekker 霍爾效應軸加上最成熟的 Rapid Trigger 實作，能實測縮短 counter-strafe 時間，今年評測量到大約比傳統軸快 26%，從約 82ms 降到 61ms。這在 CS2 跟 Valorant 是真實的競技優勢，也是 60HE 還是 CS2 職業圈最熱門板子的原因。

Wooting 80HE 守第二，推 8000 Hz 回報率，逼近一次按鍵能被偵測的物理極限，Wootility 軟體對新手還是最好上手的類比工具。

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 第三當主流霍爾替代，靠 OmniPoint。Keychron Q1 Pro 守第四當玩家做工跟無線之選，台灣賣大概 NT$6,000 上下，鋁殼手感扎實。

老實說 NuPhy Field75 HE 第五還是 CP 值霍爾入門，價格壓在兩台 Wooting 之下又沒放掉 rapid trigger。

這禮拜沒有東西出來重排前段，所以六月結論很穩。競技 FPS 選 Wooting 60HE，要大配列加 8K 回報選 80HE，要打磨好的主流體驗選 Apex Pro，要有客製手感的重磅板加無線就 Keychron Q1 Pro。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 靠實測延遲守住競技王冠
highlights.body: Lekker 霍爾軸加最成熟的 Rapid Trigger，把 counter-strafe 時間縮短大約 26%，測試裡從約 82ms 降到 61ms。這個在 CS2 跟 Valorant 量得出來的優勢讓 60HE 守第一，也是職業圈最熱門的板子。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 第二把回報率天花板往上推
highlights.body: 8000 Hz 回報率逼近一次按鍵能被偵測的物理極限，Wootility 對新手還是最好上手的類比軟體。想要大配列又一樣的 rapid trigger 血統，選 80HE。

highlights.title: NuPhy Field75 HE 是 CP 值霍爾入門
highlights.body: 總排第五，價格壓在兩台 Wooting 之下又保留完整 rapid trigger。想要類比磁軸又不想付旗艦價的玩家，這是進霍爾遊戲最聰明的入門。

en.commentary:
The Wooting 60HE holds rank 1, and the arrival of the 60HE v2 only strengthens the case for Wooting's dominance of competitive gaming keyboards. The original 60HE earned its reputation on pioneering rapid trigger firmware that the community keeps refining, delivering the fastest, most precise key response on the market, which is exactly what the 9.8 latency and 9.8 switch scores reflect. The v2 is a ground-up redesign: new closed-bottom Lekker Tikken Hall Effect switches give a full 4mm travel with a more tactile, satisfying keystroke, an aluminum case is now standard where the original shipped in plastic, and 8KHz Tachyon Mode polling jumps up from the 1KHz of the original 60HE+. Plastic-case versions began shipping in April 2026, so the v2 is now widely available.

The Wooting 80HE at rank 2 stays the pick for players who want rapid trigger in a more complete layout with arrow keys and a function row, and many reviewers still call it the single safest gaming keyboard recommendation for most people. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless at rank 3 remains the strongest mainstream-brand Hall Effect option for buyers who want wireless and OmniPoint adjustability from a household name.

Further down, the Keychron Q1 Pro at rank 4 stays the enthusiast custom-feel pick, and the NuPhy Field75 HE at rank 5 continues to blend Hall Effect performance with a more playful design language. The throughline for summer 2026 is that Hall Effect and rapid trigger are now the default expectation for competitive boards, and Wooting still sets the standard. If you play ranked FPS, the 60HE remains the keyboard to beat, and the v2 refresh keeps it firmly at the front.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE Stays the Competitive Standard
highlights.body: With 9.8 latency and 9.8 switch scores, the Wooting 60HE delivers the fastest, most precise rapid trigger response on the market, refined continuously by its community. It remains the keyboard to beat for ranked FPS, holding rank 1.

highlights.title: 60HE v2 Is a Ground-Up Redesign
highlights.body: The v2 adds closed-bottom Lekker Tikken switches with a full 4mm tactile travel, a standard aluminum case, and 8KHz Tachyon Mode polling up from 1KHz. Plastic-case versions began shipping in April 2026, making the refreshed board widely available.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE Is the Safest All-Round Pick
highlights.body: At rank 2, the Wooting 80HE brings rapid trigger to a fuller layout with arrow keys and a function row. Many reviewers still call it the single safest gaming keyboard recommendation for most players.

zh-tw.commentary:
Wooting 60HE 坐穩第一，而 60HE v2 的登場更是把 Wooting 在競技鍵盤的主導地位坐得更穩。初代 60HE 靠著開創性的 rapid trigger 韌體建立名聲，社群還持續精進，給出市場上最快、最精準的按鍵反應，這正是延遲 9.8、軸體 9.8 分所反映的。v2 是從頭重新設計：新的封底 Lekker Tikken 霍爾軸給你完整 4mm 行程，敲擊更有段落感也更扎實，鋁合金外殼現在是標配，初代用的是塑膠，8KHz Tachyon 模式回報率也從初代 60HE+ 的 1KHz 大幅提升。塑膠殼版本 4 月開始出貨，所以 v2 現在已經買得到了。

Wooting 80HE 排第二，想要 rapid trigger 又要方向鍵和功能列的人選它，很多評測還是把它當成最穩的大眾首選。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 第三，想要大廠牌、無線又有 OmniPoint 可調行程的人，這是最強的主流選擇。

再往下，Keychron Q1 Pro 第四，玩家向客製手感的代表；NuPhy Field75 HE 第五，把霍爾軸效能和更活潑的設計語言結合得很好。2026 夏天的主軸是，霍爾軸和 rapid trigger 現在已經是競技鍵盤的預設標配，而 Wooting 仍然在定標準。打排位 FPS 的話，60HE 還是那把要被超越的標竿，v2 改款讓它穩穩待在最前面。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 仍是競技標準
highlights.body: 延遲 9.8、軸體 9.8，Wooting 60HE 給出市場上最快、最精準的 rapid trigger 反應，社群持續精進。打排位 FPS 它還是那把要被超越的標竿，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: 60HE v2 從頭重新設計

en.commentary: The Wooting 60HE keeps my top spot, and for competitive players I do not think anything has earned a better claim. Its Hall effect switches with rapid trigger remain the benchmark for analog control, letting you tune actuation to the millimeter and reset faster than mechanical switches can manage. For FPS players chasing every advantage, this is still the safest recommendation on the board. The Wooting 80HE sits right behind it for anyone who wants the same magnetic tech in a larger layout, and the SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless rounds out the analog top tier for people who need cordless freedom. Outside the competitive lane, the Keychron Q1 Pro stays my pick for typists and enthusiasts, that heavyweight aluminum case and tuned, gasket-mounted feel deliver the satisfying thock people chase, right out of the box with no modding required. The enthusiast scene this year is healthy, with strong Hall effect options arriving even at budget prices, but none of that disrupts the top of my list because the leaders nail their respective jobs so completely. My rankings hold this week. If you game competitively, buy magnetic and buy the Wooting. If you type all day and want a board that sounds and feels premium, the Keychron is the one. Decide which of those two camps you live in first, and the rest of the list sorts itself out from there.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE is still the competitive benchmark
highlights.body: Its Hall effect switches with rapid trigger let you tune actuation to the millimeter and reset faster than mechanical switches can. For FPS players chasing every edge, it remains the safest pick on the board.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the enthusiast and typist choice
highlights.body: The heavyweight aluminum case and tuned gasket mount deliver that satisfying thock straight out of the box, no modding needed. If you type all day and want a premium feel, this is the one to buy.

highlights.title: Pick your camp first
highlights.body: Competitive gamers should buy magnetic and go Wooting, while typists who want premium sound and feel should go Keychron. Decide which group you belong to and the rest of the ranking falls into place.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 還是我榜首，對競技玩家來說，我想不出有誰比它更有資格。它的霍爾效應軸加上 rapid trigger，仍是類比控制的標竿，觸發點可以調到 0.1 公釐，回彈又比機械軸快。對追求每一分優勢的 FPS 玩家來說，它仍是榜上最穩的推薦。Wooting 80HE 緊跟在後，給想要同樣磁軸技術但要大一點配列的人，SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 則補上類比前段班的無線需求。離開競技路線，Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我給文字工作者跟玩家的選擇，那個厚實的鋁合金外殼、調校過的 gasket 結構，開箱就有大家追的那種扎實 thock 聲，完全不用改裝。今年客製化圈很熱鬧，連平價也開始有像樣的霍爾效應選項，不過這些都動不了我榜首，因為這幾台把各自的本分做得太完整。這週排名維持。打競技就買磁軸、買 Wooting。整天打字又想要高級手感跟聲音，就選 Keychron。先想清楚你是哪一派，剩下的排序自然就對了。

en.commentary: Hall effect is the whole conversation in keyboards right now, and as of June 2026 Wooting still owns it. The Wooting 60HE keeps my top spot and the 80HE sits right behind it, and the reason is the software as much as the switches: Wootility is the most extensive yet genuinely easy-to-use analog tuning suite out there, and that is what turns adjustable actuation and rapid trigger from a spec sheet into something you actually feel in an FPS. Fresh data backs this up. In the ProSettings.net April 2026 dataset of 2,252 tracked pros, the 80HE is the second most-used board overall, which is remarkable for a small Dutch company. The Lekker V2 switches paired with true 8,000Hz Tachyon polling land input latency around 0.125ms, and that is about as fast as this category gets today. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds rank three as the best big-brand HE option with a polished OmniPoint feel, and the Keychron Q1 Pro stays the enthusiast pick at four for anyone who cares more about typing feel and a gasket-mounted aluminium build than raw analog speed. Nothing this week warranted a rank change, so the order carries forward. If you play competitive FPS, the 60HE or 80HE is the safest buy here, and the choice between them is simply whether you want a 60 percent or a tenkeyless layout.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE stays number one
highlights.body: Lekker V2 analog switches plus the deep, friendly Wootility software make adjustable actuation and rapid trigger feel real in-game. The 60 percent layout keeps it at the top.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE is the pro favorite
highlights.body: It is the second most-used board among 2,252 tracked pros in ProSettings' April 2026 data, with true 8KHz Tachyon polling and roughly 0.125ms latency.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the big-brand HE pick
highlights.body: Polished OmniPoint adjustable switches and solid software keep it at rank three for buyers who want a major-brand Hall effect board.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro is the enthusiast choice
highlights.body: A gasket-mounted aluminium build and excellent typing feel keep it at rank four for people who value feel over raw analog speed.

highlights.title: Layout is the only real decision at the top
highlights.body: Between the 60HE and 80HE the question is simply 60 percent versus tenkeyless. Both deliver the same class-leading analog performance.

zh-tw.commentary: 鍵盤現在的話題就是磁軸（Hall effect），到 2026 年 6 月，Wooting 還是王者。Wooting 60HE 維持我這邊第一，80HE 緊跟在後，重點除了軸體，更在軟體：Wootility 是目前最完整又真的好上手的類比調校工具，它把可調觸發行程跟 rapid trigger 從規格表變成你在 FPS 裡真的感覺得到的東西。有新數據撐腰。ProSettings.net 2026 年 4 月、追蹤 2,252 名職業選手的資料裡，80HE 是整體第二多人用的鍵盤，對一家荷蘭小公司來說很猛。Lekker V2 軸配上真正的 8,000Hz Tachyon 輪詢，輸入延遲壓到約 0.125ms，這已經是這個類別目前的天花板等級。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守住第三，是大廠磁軸裡手感最成熟的選擇；Keychron Q1 Pro 維持第四的玩家定位，給那些更在意打字手感跟 gasket 鋁殼、而不是純類比速度的人。這週沒有值得動排名的消息，順序照舊。打競技 FPS 的話，60HE 或 80HE 是這裡最安心的選擇，兩者怎麼選就只是你要 60% 還是 TKL 配列而已。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 穩坐第一

en.commentary: The big story in keyboards this June is that Hall effect has finished going mainstream, and my ranking has been built around that shift for months. The price gap collapsed: the magnetic-switch tech that used to mean spending 175 dollars now starts around 40 to 50, and as of April roughly 40 percent of tracked pro esports players run a Hall effect or analog optical board, up from essentially zero in 2022. That is exactly why the Wooting 60HE+ stays at number one. It is still the keyboard that defined rapid trigger, the Wootility software remains the best in the business for tuning actuation per key, and for a competitive player nothing else feels this responsive. The Wooting 80HE holds second for anyone who wants the same engine in a fuller, more premium TKL-ish layout with arrow keys. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless stays third as the most polished all-rounder, the board I hand to someone who wants Hall effect performance plus genuinely good wireless and an OLED screen. Keychron's Q1 Pro keeps fourth because it is still the enthusiast pick when build quality, gasket feel and acoustics matter more than rapid trigger, and that gorgeous CNC case earns its keep. NuPhy Field75 HE rounds out a strong top five. The rest of the board carries forward unchanged. My advice has not moved: if you game competitively, buy Hall effect now that it is cheap, and if you type all day for the love of it, the Q1 Pro is still the one to beat.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ still defines rapid trigger
highlights.body: It is the board that created the category and the Wootility software remains the best for per-key actuation tuning. For a competitive player nothing else feels this responsive, which keeps it at number one.

highlights.title: Hall effect is now a no-brainer
highlights.body: The tech that cost 175 dollars now starts near 40, and around 40 percent of tracked pros already run it. If you game seriously, this is the month the value math finally makes the switch obvious.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the polished all-rounder
highlights.body: It pairs Hall effect performance with genuinely good wireless and an OLED screen. For someone who wants the speed plus everyday features rather than a pure esports tool, it stays a deserved third.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro owns the enthusiast lane
highlights.body: When gasket feel, acoustics and that CNC case matter more than rapid trigger, it is still the board to beat. For typists who buy for the love of it, fourth undersells how good it feels.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個 6 月鍵盤圈最大的故事，就是磁軸（Hall effect）徹底走進主流，而我的排名好幾個月前就照這個轉變在排了。價差崩了，以前要花一百七十幾美金的磁軸技術，現在四十到五十美金就有，而且到 4 月為止，被追蹤的職業電競選手大約有四成在用磁軸或類比光軸鍵盤，2022 年時這數字基本上是零。這正是 Wooting 60HE+ 守第一的原因。它依然是定義了快速觸發（rapid trigger）的那把鍵盤，Wootility 軟體在「逐鍵調觸發點」這件事上還是業界最強，對競技玩家來說沒有別的東西這麼跟手。Wooting 80HE 守第二，給想要同一套引擎、但要更完整更高級、帶方向鍵的接近 TKL 配列的人。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三，是最成熟的全能型，我會推給想要磁軸效能又要真的好用的無線加 OLED 螢幕的人。Keychron Q1 Pro 守第四，因為當你更在意做工、gasket 手感跟敲擊音色而不是快速觸發時，它還是玩家首選，那個漂亮的 CNC 鋁殼值回票價。NuPhy Field75 HE 撐起紮實的前五。其餘照舊。我的建議沒變，你要打競技，現在磁軸這麼便宜就直接買，你是整天打字的愛好者，Q1 Pro 還是那把要被超越的標竿。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE+ 仍定義快速觸發
highlights.body: 它是開創這個類別的鍵盤，Wootility 在逐鍵調觸發點上還是最強。對競技玩家沒別的東西這麼跟手，所以第一還是它。

highlights.title: 磁軸現在閉著眼睛買就對
highlights.body: 以前一百七十幾美金的技術現在四十美金起跳，而且約四成職業選手已經在用。你要認真打電競，這個月性價比終於讓換軸變得理所當然。

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是成熟全能型
highlights.body: 它把磁軸效能配上真的好用的無線跟 OLED 螢幕。想要速度又要日常功能、而不是純電競工具的人，它穩坐第三。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 主宰玩家路線
highlights.body: 當 gasket 手感、音色、CNC 鋁殼比快速觸發更重要時，它還是那把要被超越的。對為愛買鍵盤的打字派，第四其實低估了它的手感。

references.title: Best gaming keyboards 2026: Hall effect, mechanical, TKL tested
The 6 Best Gaming Keyboards of 2026

en.commentary: The Wooting 60HE stays at number one because it changed what a gaming keyboard is supposed to do, and the rest of the market is still catching up. Hall effect switches with adjustable actuation mean you set exactly how far a key travels before it fires, plus rapid trigger for instant resets, and once you play on it a normal mechanical board feels slow. For competitive FPS this is the standard now, full stop. The Wooting 80HE holds second as the same magic in a larger layout for people who want the arrows and a few extra keys. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless stays third as the mainstream-brand answer with Hall effect and the best software polish of the big names, the pick for buyers who want the tech without the enthusiast learning curve. The Keychron Q1 Pro holds fourth for the typing crowd who care about board feel and sound over actuation tricks. Nothing this week reordered the field. The clear read: Hall effect won the performance argument, so if you game competitively, buy a magnetic board and do not look back.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE redefined the gaming keyboard
highlights.body: Adjustable Hall effect actuation plus rapid trigger lets you tune exactly when each key fires, and a normal mechanical board feels slow afterward. For competitive FPS it is the standard now, holding number one.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE is the same magic, bigger
highlights.body: It brings the adjustable actuation and rapid trigger to a fuller layout with arrows and extra keys. For players who want the performance without the cramped 60 percent footprint, it is the clear second.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL is the mainstream-brand pick
highlights.body: Hall effect tech with the best software polish among the big names, easier to live with than enthusiast boards. For buyers who want the performance without the learning curve, it holds a firm third.

highlights.title: Hall effect won the performance argument
highlights.body: Adjustable actuation and rapid trigger are a genuine competitive edge, not marketing. If you game seriously, buy a magnetic board, because traditional mechanical switches now feel a step behind.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 我還是放第一，因為它改變了電競鍵盤該做什麼，而市場其他人還在追。霍爾效應軸搭可調觸發點，代表你能精確設定一個鍵要按多深才觸發，加上 rapid trigger 瞬間重置，玩過之後一般機械鍵盤就感覺慢。競技 FPS 現在就是這個標準，沒得談。Wooting 80HE 守第二，是同一套魔法換大配列，給想要方向鍵跟多幾顆鍵的人。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三，是主流品牌的答案，有霍爾效應、軟體也是大廠裡最精緻的，給想要這技術又不想要玩家級學習曲線的買家。Keychron Q1 Pro 守第四，給在意敲擊手感跟聲音勝過觸發花招的打字派。這週沒事件重排。清楚的判斷：霍爾效應贏了效能這場辯論，認真打競技就買磁軸，別回頭。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 重新定義電競鍵盤

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL 是主流品牌選擇
highlights.body: 霍爾效應技術加大廠裡最精緻的軟體，比玩家級鍵盤好相處。想要效能又不想要學習曲線的買家，它穩在第三。

en.commentary: The Wooting 60HE holds my number one because it remains the most decisive competitive keyboard on the market, and the 2026 reviews keep arriving at the same conclusion. Its Lekker Hall-effect switches with 0.1mm Rapid Trigger resolution and adjustable actuation give CS2 and Valorant players a genuine input edge, and the Wootility software is still the most mature implementation of any analog board. The latency is effectively instant. This is the keyboard the pros default to, and nothing this week unseats it. The 80HE stays a razor-thin second and is the smarter buy for most people. It brings the exact same Lekker V2 magnetic architecture, 0.1 to 4.0mm adjustable actuation, Rapid Trigger, and Snap Tap to an 80% layout that keeps the arrow keys and a full function row. PC Gamer and RTINGS both crown it the best gaming keyboard tested, and a fresh data point sharpens the case: roughly 13.4% of pro esports players in the April 2026 ProSettings dataset run an 80HE, with its 8,000Hz Tachyon polling delivering about 0.125ms latency. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the best wireless analog option, with OmniPoint 2.0 adjustable switches that get closest to Wooting performance without a cable. For non-Hall-effect buyers the Keychron Q1 Pro is still the gold standard, an aluminum gasket-mount board with full QMK/Via support and the best typing feel here. The NuPhy Field75 HE remains the value play in magnetic boards, packing 8000Hz polling and adjustable actuation for 149 dollars.

highlights.title: The Wooting 60HE is still the competitive default
highlights.body: Lekker Hall-effect switches, 0.1mm Rapid Trigger resolution, adjustable actuation, and the most mature analog software in Wootility. For CS2 and Valorant players chasing every millisecond, it remains the keyboard to beat.

highlights.title: The Wooting 80HE is the smarter buy for most people
highlights.body: The same magnetic architecture with arrow keys and a full function row, plus 8,000Hz Tachyon polling at roughly 0.125ms latency. Around 13.4% of pros in the April 2026 ProSettings dataset already run one.

highlights.title: The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless owns the cordless analog tier
highlights.body: OmniPoint 2.0 adjustable switches with 2.4GHz wireless and a 40g actuation force. It gets closest to Wooting-grade performance without a cable, which is why it holds third.

highlights.title: The Keychron Q1 Pro is the non-Hall-effect gold standard
highlights.body: An aluminum gasket-mount board with full QMK/Via support and the best typing feel in the lineup. If you want a premium custom board over raw analog speed, this is the one.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 守住第一，因為它依然是市場上最有決定性優勢的競技鍵盤，2026 各家評測也一直得出同樣結論。Lekker 霍爾效應磁軸搭配 0.1mm Rapid Trigger 精度和可調觸發點，給 CS2 和 Valorant 玩家真正的輸入優勢，Wootility 軟體還是所有類比鍵盤裡最成熟的實作，延遲幾乎等於零。這就是職業選手的預設選擇，本週也沒東西能拉它下來。80HE 以毫釐之差守住第二，對大多數人來說是更聰明的選擇。它把一模一樣的 Lekker V2 磁軸架構、0.1 到 4.0mm 可調觸發、Rapid Trigger 和 Snap Tap 搬到 80% 配列，保留方向鍵和完整 F 排。PC Gamer 和 RTINGS 都把它選成實測最強電競鍵盤，還有一個新數據加分，2026 年四月 ProSettings 資料裡大約 13.4% 的職業選手用 80HE，8,000Hz Tachyon 輪詢做到約 0.125ms 延遲。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守住第三，是最強的無線類比選項，OmniPoint 2.0 可調軸不用接線就最接近 Wooting 的效能。不玩磁軸的人，Keychron Q1 Pro 還是黃金標準，鋁合金 Gasket-mount 加完整 QMK/Via，打字手感是這裡最好的。NuPhy Field75 HE 依然是磁軸的性價比解，149 美金就給你 8000Hz 輪詢加可調觸發。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 還是競技預設
highlights.body: Lekker 霍爾磁軸、0.1mm Rapid Trigger 精度、可調觸發，加上 Wootility 這套最成熟的類比軟體。CS2 和 Valorant 玩家追每一毫秒，它還是要打倒的那一顆。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 對大多數人是更聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 一樣的磁軸架構，多了方向鍵和完整 F 排，8,000Hz Tachyon 輪詢約 0.125ms 延遲。2026 四月 ProSettings 資料裡約 13.4% 職業選手已經在用。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 稱霸無線類比層
highlights.body: OmniPoint 2.0 可調軸加 2.4G 無線、40g 觸發力。不用接線就最接近 Wooting 等級的效能，這就是它守住第三的原因。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是非磁軸的黃金標準
highlights.body: 鋁合金 Gasket-mount 加完整 QMK/Via 支援，打字手感全榜最好。想要高階客製化而不是純類比速度，就是它。

en.commentary: The Wooting 60HE keeps the top spot and the competitive numbers back it up. In the ProSettings.net April 2026 dataset the Wooting 80HE was one of the most-used boards among tracked esports pros, and the whole Hall effect lineup is what serious players reach for because you can dial in the actuation distance of every key. The 60HE is the one I recommend most because the compact layout suits fast aiming and the Wootility software is genuinely the easiest tuning experience out there. The 80HE sits at second for players who want the same switches with arrows and a function row. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the polished all-rounder with adjustable actuation and a clean wireless experience. For people who care more about typing feel than esports latency, the Keychron Q1 Pro stays my pick at fourth thanks to its gasket-mounted build and excellent sound. Reviews this week reinforced the existing order without any launch big enough to move it, so I am holding scores steady.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE stays the esports default

highlights.title: 80HE for the same feel with arrows
highlights.body: If you want Wooting's switches but need a function row and arrow keys, the 80HE is the answer. It holds second on the strength of the same tuning experience.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro wins on typing feel
highlights.body: Its gasket-mounted build and sound make it the pick for people who prize typing over raw latency. It stays comfortably at fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Wooting 60HE 還是穩坐第一，電競數據也撐得住這個判斷。在 ProSettings.net 2026 年 4 月的統計裡，Wooting 80HE 是被追蹤的職業選手最常用的鍵盤之一，而整個霍爾效應系列就是認真玩家會選的，因為每顆鍵的觸發行程都能自己調。我最推的還是 60HE，緊湊配列適合快速瞄準，Wootility 軟體調整體驗真的是市面上最好上手的。80HE 排第二，給想要同樣軸體又需要方向鍵跟功能列的人。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版守第三，是打磨得很完整的全能型，觸發可調，無線體驗乾淨俐落。如果你比較在意打字手感而不是電競延遲，Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我第四名的選擇，墊片結構加上聲音表現都很棒。這週是評測再次確認既有排序，沒有大到能撼動榜單的新品，所以分數我都維持不動。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 仍是電競首選
highlights.body: 霍爾效應軸體可逐鍵調整觸發，Wootility 調起來毫無痛苦。緊湊配列適合快速瞄準，所以是我最推的一把。

highlights.title: 想要同手感加方向鍵就選 80HE
highlights.body: 喜歡 Wooting 軸體又需要功能列跟方向鍵，80HE 就是答案。靠同樣的調整體驗守住第二。

en.commentary: Wooting still owns the top of this board, and the reviews this week keep reinforcing why. The 60HE stays my number one for most competitive players because it delivers the full Wooting experience, per-key Rapid Trigger, true 8K polling and analog inputs, in a compact footprint that frees up desk space for big mouse sweeps. The 80HE sits just behind it and is the one PC Gamer and RTINGS both rank first overall, and I get the argument. Around 13 percent of pro esports players run it, and if you want the same magnetic-switch speed with a near full-size layout, it is the obvious pick. The thing that keeps Wooting on top is Wootility, which is still the best configuration software in the category, deep yet approachable, with onboard profiles that work without any app running. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the premium wireless option with adjustable actuation and a polished feel. For people who care more about typing than twitch speed, the Keychron Q1 Pro remains my favorite, a gasket-mounted aluminum board that sounds and feels superb out of the box. My short take for June: 60HE for compact competitive play, 80HE if you want the numpad-adjacent layout, and the Q1 Pro if typing feel is your priority.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 仍然霸佔這張榜的頂端，這週的評測也持續說明原因。60HE 還是我給多數電競玩家的第一名，因為它把完整的 Wooting 體驗，每鍵 Rapid Trigger、真 8K 輪詢和類比輸入，塞進精巧的尺寸裡，桌面省下的空間正好給低速滑鼠大甩。80HE 緊跟在後，是 PC Gamer 和 RTINGS 都排總冠軍的那一把，我懂他們的理由。大約一成三的職業電競選手在用它，想要同樣的磁軸速度又要接近全尺寸配列，它就是明顯之選。讓 Wooting 一直在頂端的關鍵是 Wootility，它仍是這個品類最好的設定軟體，深但好上手，板載設定檔不開 App 也能用。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守住第三，是可調觸發點、質感細膩的高階無線之選。比起急速反應更在意打字手感的人，Keychron Q1 Pro 仍是我的最愛，墊片結構鋁殼，開箱即用的聲音和手感都很棒。六月的快速結論：精巧電競選 60HE，想要接近數字鍵區配列選 80HE，打字手感優先就挑 Q1 Pro。

en.commentary: Wooting holds the top of this board again, and this week the reason got even clearer. The reporting I read tracked the Wooting 80HE as the single most used keyboard among pro esports players, sitting at roughly 13.4 percent of more than 2,250 tracked players in the spring dataset. That is a remarkable share for a board from a small Dutch maker, and it tells you exactly how much the competitive scene trusts it. I keep the 60HE at number one for most players because it delivers the full Wooting experience, per key Rapid Trigger, true 8K polling and analog inputs, in a compact 60 percent footprint that frees the desk for big mouse swings. The 80HE sits right behind it and is the obvious pick if you want that same magnetic switch speed with a layout closer to full size. The deeper story this week is how mainstream Hall effect has become. Three years ago it was a niche curiosity from one startup, and now Corsair, ASUS, Logitech, Razer, SteelSeries and Keychron all ship magnetic lineups, and Rapid Trigger is table stakes rather than a Wooting exclusive. What still keeps Wooting on top through all that is Wootility, the deepest yet most approachable configuration software in the category, with onboard profiles that work with no app running. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the premium wireless option with adjustable actuation and a polished feel. For people who care more about typing than twitch speed, the Keychron Q1 Pro stays my favorite, a gasket mounted aluminum board that sounds and feels superb out of the box. My short take for June, 60HE for compact competitive play, 80HE for the larger layout, Q1 Pro if typing feel is your priority.

highlights.title: The Wooting 60HE is still the smartest pick for competitive play
highlights.body: Per key Rapid Trigger, true 8,000Hz polling and analog inputs land in a compact 60 percent body that clears the desk for low sensitivity mouse swings. That combination is why it remains the board I point most aim focused players toward, and the pro adoption data this week only reinforces it.

highlights.title: Wooting's lead lives in the software, not just the switches
highlights.body: Now that every major brand ships Hall effect, the magnet is no longer the differentiator. Wootility is, it remains the deepest yet most approachable configuration tool in the category, with onboard profiles that run with no app open, which is exactly what you want on a competition machine.

highlights.title: The 80HE is the layout most players actually want
highlights.body: It carries the same magnetic switch speed and 8K polling as the 60HE in a footprint closer to full size, which is why it tops the pro usage charts. If you want Wooting performance without giving up arrow keys and a function row, this is the one to buy.

highlights.title: The Keychron Q1 Pro wins the typing crown
highlights.body: For people who value feel over reaction time, its gasket mounted aluminum build sounds and feels superb straight out of the box, no modding required. It is the board I recommend when the keyboard is for writing and coding rather than ranked play.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 又一次坐穩榜首，而且這禮拜的理由更硬了。我看到的數據追蹤顯示，Wooting 80HE 是職業電競選手用得最多的鍵盤，在超過 2250 位追蹤選手裡佔了大約 13.4 趴。一個荷蘭小廠的鍵盤能拿到這種佔有率，老實說很猛，這直接說明了競技圈對它的信任度有多高。我把 60HE 放第一給大多數玩家，因為它給你完整的 Wooting 體驗，每鍵 Rapid Trigger、真 8K 輪詢、類比輸入，全塞進 60 趴的小尺寸機身，桌面空間整個讓出來給低靈敏度甩滑鼠。80HE 緊跟在後，如果你想要一樣的磁軸速度但要接近全尺寸的配列，它就是首選。這週更深一層的故事是霍爾效應徹底主流化了。三年前這還是一家新創的冷門玩意，現在 Corsair、ASUS、羅技、Razer、SteelSeries、Keychron 全都有磁軸產品線，Rapid Trigger 也從 Wooting 獨家變成基本盤。話說回來，在這種洗牌下還能讓 Wooting 穩坐第一的，是 Wootility 軟體，全品類最深又最好上手的設定工具，板載設定檔不開 App 也能跑。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三，無線旗艦加可調觸發點，質感到位。打字派的話，Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我的最愛，墊圈結構鋁殼，開箱即用聲音手感都頂。六月的結論，競技壓低尺寸選 60HE，要大配列選 80HE，重打字手感選 Q1 Pro。

highlights.title: 競技玩家還是該先看 Wooting 60HE
highlights.body: 每鍵 Rapid Trigger、真 8000Hz 輪詢、類比輸入，全包在 60 趴的小機身裡，桌面整個清出來甩滑鼠。這組合就是我最推給瞄準派玩家的原因，這週的職業採用數據又再加強了一次。

highlights.title: Wooting 的優勢在軟體，不只在軸
highlights.body: 現在每個大廠都有磁軸，磁鐵本身已經不是賣點了，Wootility 才是。它仍是全品類最深又最好上手的設定工具，板載設定檔不開 App 也能跑，這正是比賽機該有的特性。

highlights.title: 80HE 才是多數人真正想要的配列
highlights.body: 它把跟 60HE 一樣的磁軸速度跟 8K 輪詢塞進接近全尺寸的機身，這也是它登上職業使用率榜首的原因。想要 Wooting 效能又不想放棄方向鍵跟功能列，買這把就對了。

highlights.title: 打字王座屬於 Keychron Q1 Pro
highlights.body: 在意手感勝過反應速度的人，它墊圈結構的鋁殼開箱聲音手感就很棒，不用改裝。鍵盤主要拿來寫字寫程式而不是排位的話，我會推這把。

en.commentary: The Wooting 60HE keeps my top spot, and the more I use Hall effect boards the more obvious that call becomes. The new Lekker Tikken switches that shipped last November give it a deeper, more muted sound while keeping the adjustable actuation and rapid trigger that make analog keyboards feel like cheating in competitive shooters. At its price it is the easiest entry point into this category, full stop. The Wooting 80HE stays second for anyone who wants a more complete layout, and latency testing from Optimum Tech and Rtings puts its end-to-end response around 2.5ms, among the lowest numbers recorded for any keyboard in 2026. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the polished mainstream pick, with excellent software and reliable wireless. For people who care about typing feel over pure speed, the Keychron Q1 Pro stays my fourth pick, that gasket-mounted aluminum build sounds and feels premium in a way gaming boards rarely match. The NuPhy Field75 HE and Endgame Gear KB65HE remain strong value picks just below. Nothing reshaped the leaderboard this week, the Hall effect wave is mature and steady, so I am keeping the order intact. My advice: get the Wooting 60HE if you play competitively, the Q1 Pro if you mostly type, and the Apex Pro TKL Wireless if you want a no-fuss premium all-rounder.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE is the best entry into Hall effect
highlights.body: The new Lekker Tikken switches add a deeper sound while keeping adjustable actuation and rapid trigger, the easiest way into analog keyboards.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE posts elite latency
highlights.body: Optimum Tech and Rtings measured around 2.5ms end-to-end, among the lowest of any keyboard in 2026, in a fuller layout.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro wins on typing feel
highlights.body: The gasket-mounted aluminum build sounds and feels premium in a way most gaming boards never reach, my pick for typists.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the easy premium pick
highlights.body: Excellent software and reliable wireless make it the no-fuss mainstream choice for people who want it to just work.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 60HE 守住我的第一名，而且我越用磁軸鍵盤，越覺得這個排名理所當然。去年十一月上市的新 Lekker Tikken 軸，給了它更低沉更收斂的聲音，同時保留可調觸發點跟 rapid trigger，這些在競技射擊裡用起來簡直像開外掛。以它的價格，這就是踏進磁軸這個坑最好入手的一張，沒有之一。Wooting 80HE 排第二，給想要更完整配列的人，Optimum Tech 跟 Rtings 的延遲測試把它的端到端反應壓到約 2.5 毫秒，是 2026 年所有鍵盤裡數一數二低的。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版守住第三，是最成熟的主流選擇，軟體好用、無線穩定。比較在意打字手感而不是純速度的人，Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我的第四，那個 gasket 結構鋁殼，敲起來的聲音跟手感有種電競鍵盤很少做到的高級感。NuPhy Field75 HE 跟 Endgame Gear KB65HE 緊接在後，依舊是高 CP 值好選擇。這週排行榜沒被重新洗牌，磁軸這波已經成熟又穩定，所以排名我維持原樣。建議：打競技就拿 Wooting 60HE，主要打字就選 Q1 Pro，想要省事的高級全能型就挑 Apex Pro TKL 無線版。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 是磁軸最佳入門
highlights.body: 新 Lekker Tikken 軸帶來更低沉的聲音，又保留可調觸發點與 rapid trigger，是踏進磁軸坑最好入手的一張。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 延遲頂尖
highlights.body: Optimum Tech 與 Rtings 實測端到端約 2.5 毫秒，是 2026 年最低之一，還給了更完整的配列。

highlights.body: gasket 鋁殼結構，敲起來的聲音與手感有電競鍵盤少見的高級感，是打字派首選。

highlights.body: 軟體好用、無線穩定，是想要拿來就能用的主流玩家最省心的選擇。

en.commentary: I am making a swap at the top this week, and I feel good about it. After fresh hands-on coverage crowned the Wooting 80HE as the best gaming keyboard right now, I moved it into first. The argument is simple: it pairs the same elite Hall effect switches and 8,000 Hz polling as its smaller sibling with a full size layout and arrow keys, and the Wootility software remains the best tuning suite in the category by a wide margin. For competitive players who want rapid trigger and per key actuation that actually feels intuitive to set up, this is the keyboard I now hand them first. The Wooting 60HE drops to second, and it is still a phenomenal board. If your desk is tight or you love a compact footprint, the 60HE gives you the identical switch feel and polling in a smaller frame, so I kept its value mark higher to reflect that. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the premium all rounder with the cleanest wireless experience among Hall effect boards. The Keychron Q1 Pro stays fourth for enthusiasts who care about a heavy gasket mounted typing feel over raw latency. The big trend is clear: Hall effect has gone fully mainstream, with Keychron, Corsair, Razer, and Logitech all shipping magnetic options. Buy the 80HE if you want my new number one, the 60HE if you want compact, and the Apex Pro TKL if seamless wireless tops your list.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE takes first
highlights.body: Fresh reviews crowned it the best gaming keyboard, and full size layout plus the unmatched Wootility suite earned the top spot.

highlights.title: Hall effect goes mainstream
highlights.body: Keychron, Corsair, Razer, and Logitech all ship magnetic switches now, pushing rapid trigger into the everyday market.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我要在榜首做個對調，而且我覺得很有底氣。最新實機評測把 Wooting 80HE 捧為當下最好的電競鍵盤之後，我把它移到第一。理由很單純：它把跟小老弟一樣頂級的霍爾效應軸跟 8,000 Hz 回報率，配上全尺寸配列加上方向鍵，而 Wootility 軟體仍是這個類別裡領先一大截的最佳調校工具。對想要 rapid trigger、想要每顆鍵觸發點都能直覺設定的競技玩家來說，這把現在是我第一個遞給他們的鍵盤。Wooting 60HE 退到第二，它依然是一把超強的板子。如果你桌面空間很緊、或就是愛精巧的佔位，60HE 用更小的框體給你一模一樣的軸體手感跟回報率，所以我把它的價值分留得比較高來反映這點。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守住第三，是高階全能款，無線體驗在霍爾鍵盤裡最乾淨俐落。Keychron Q1 Pro 維持第四，給那些比起純延遲更在乎厚實 gasket 結構打字手感的玩家。大趨勢很明顯：霍爾效應已經完全主流化，Keychron、Corsair、Razer、Logitech 全都推出了磁軸款。想要我的新第一就買 80HE，要精巧選 60HE，無線順暢擺第一就挑 Apex Pro TKL。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 登上第一
highlights.body: 最新評測封它為最佳電競鍵盤，全尺寸配列加上無敵的 Wootility 軟體，拿下榜首。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 維持精巧之王
highlights.body: 同樣軸體手感與 8K 回報率塞進更小框體，靠較高的價值分守住第二，適合桌面緊湊的人。

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE keeps the crown this week, and it deserves it. PC Gamer and Cybernews both reaffirmed it as the Hall-effect board to beat, and after living with one I agree: the true 8000Hz polling and 0.1mm adjustable actuation give you a near-zero-latency feel that you genuinely notice in Valorant when a counter-strafe shot lands the instant you release. Rapid Trigger and the Rappy Snappy SOCD handling are the real competitive edge here, letting the key reset the moment your finger lifts. The 60HE stays a close second for anyone who wants the same magnetic switches in a tighter footprint, and the Wootility software remains the best in the category, no account required, everything tunable per key. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL holds third on build and OmniPoint polish, and the Keychron Q1 Pro stays the pick for typists who want a gasket-mounted aluminium board that sounds incredible out of the box. Nothing genuinely new shipped this week, the roundups simply restated the established order, so I held all fourteen ranks steady. The clear story of 2026 is that magnetic Hall-effect boards now own the top of the chart, and standard mechanical switches survive mainly on feel and price. If you game competitively, buy Hall effect. If you type all day, the Keychron and Ducky still deliver the better sound and feel.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE stays the board to beat
highlights.body: True 8000Hz polling and 0.1mm actuation give a near-zero-latency feel you notice in Valorant. PC Gamer and Cybernews both reaffirmed it as the top Hall-effect pick this week.

highlights.title: Rapid Trigger is the competitive edge
highlights.body: The key resets the instant your finger lifts, and the Rappy Snappy SOCD handling makes counter-strafing cleaner. This is why magnetic boards now own the top ranks.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro wins for typists
highlights.body: The gasket-mounted aluminium build sounds incredible straight out of the box, the pick for anyone who types all day and cares about acoustics over latency.

highlights.title: Wootility leads the software fight
highlights.body: No account required, every key tunable, and it is why both Wooting boards sit at the top. Software quality is the quiet reason these stay ahead.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 80HE 這週繼續戴著王冠，而且它配得上。PC Gamer 跟 Cybernews 都再次把它捧為磁軸鍵盤的標竿，我自己用過之後也認同：真 8000Hz 回報率加上 0.1mm 可調觸發點，給你那種趨近零延遲的手感，打 Valorant 時 counter-strafe 一鬆手子彈就出去，那個瞬間你是真的感覺得到。Rapid Trigger 跟 Rappy Snappy 的 SOCD 處理才是這裡真正的競技優勢，手指一抬鍵就立刻歸位。80HE 的小老弟 60HE 守住第二，想要同樣磁軸但更精簡尺寸的人就選它，Wootility 軟體依然是這個類別最好的，不用註冊帳號，每顆鍵都能單獨微調。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 靠做工跟 OmniPoint 的成熟度守住第三，Keychron Q1 Pro 則是打字派的首選，墊片結構的鋁殼開箱就有好聽的聲音。這週沒有真正的新品上市，榜單只是重申既有排名，所以十四個名次我全部不動。2026 的故事很明確，磁軸 Hall-effect 鍵盤現在霸占榜首，傳統機械軸主要靠手感跟價格存活。你打競技就買磁軸。你整天打字，Keychron 跟 Ducky 的聲音跟手感還是更好。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 依然是標竿
highlights.body: 真 8000Hz 回報率加 0.1mm 觸發點，那種趨近零延遲的手感打 Valorant 時感覺得到。這週 PC Gamer 跟 Cybernews 都再次把它選為磁軸首選。

highlights.title: Rapid Trigger 是競技關鍵
highlights.body: 手指一抬鍵就立刻歸位，Rappy Snappy 的 SOCD 處理讓 counter-strafe 更乾淨。這就是磁軸鍵盤現在霸占榜首的原因。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 打字派首選
highlights.body: 墊片結構的鋁殼開箱就有好聽的聲音，整天打字、重視音色勝過延遲的人就挑它。

highlights.title: Wootility 軟體最強
highlights.body: 不用註冊帳號，每顆鍵都能微調，這就是兩把 Wooting 都坐在頂端的原因。軟體品質是它們穩居前段的隱形理由。

en.commentary: My order stays put this week, and the latest Hall effect coverage in June reads like a confirmation of where I already had things. The Wooting 80HE holds rank one because it bundles the strongest mix of magnetic switch feel, mature Wootility software, rapid trigger, adjustable actuation, and true 8K polling into one board that simply wins competitive scenarios. When I want the fastest, most configurable typing and gaming experience, this is what I plug in. The Wooting 60HE stays second as the compact sibling for anyone who wants the same magnetic platform in a smaller footprint, and it remains the board I recommend to FPS players short on desk space. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless keeps third on its blend of polish, wireless freedom, and the OmniPoint adjustable switches that still feel excellent under the fingers. Lower down, I want to call out the value end. The Endgame Gear KB65HE at around 50 dollars and the Keychron K8 Pro continue to punch far above their price, and for someone building a first serious board without spending big, they are honest recommendations. Reviews this month crowned the same Wooting at the top and praised the budget Hall effect newcomers, which matches what I have been testing. Nothing here earns a move. If you want the best, the 80HE. If you want value with real Hall effect tech, look at the KB65HE.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE leads again
highlights.body: Magnetic switches, mature Wootility software, rapid trigger, adjustable actuation, and true 8K polling keep the 80HE at rank one as the board I plug in for the fastest experience.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE for compact desks
highlights.body: The same magnetic platform in a smaller footprint keeps the 60HE at rank two, my recommendation for FPS players who are short on desk space.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless stays polished
highlights.body: Polish, wireless freedom, and OmniPoint adjustable switches that still feel excellent under the fingers keep the SteelSeries board at rank three.

highlights.title: Budget Hall effect punches up
highlights.body: The Endgame Gear KB65HE near 50 dollars and the Keychron K8 Pro keep punching above their price, honest picks for a first serious board on a budget.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我的排序維持不動，六月最新一輪的磁軸鍵盤評測讀起來，就像在替我原本的安排背書。Wooting 80HE 守住第一，因為它把最強的磁軸手感、成熟的 Wootility 軟體、rapid trigger、可調觸發行程，加上真正的 8K 回報率，全部塞進一把板子裡，競技場景就是贏。當我想要最快、最能客製的打字跟遊戲體驗，我插的就是它。Wooting 60HE 維持第二，是給想要同樣磁軸平台但體積更小的人，它還是我推薦給桌面空間吃緊的 FPS 玩家的板子。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版守住第三，靠的是它的精緻度、無線的自由，加上 OmniPoint 可調軸到現在按起來手感還是很棒。再往下，我想特別點名性價比這一端。大約 50 美元的 Endgame Gear KB65HE 跟 Keychron K8 Pro 一直都遠超它們的價位，對想入手第一把認真的板子又不想花大錢的人來說，是誠實的推薦。這個月的評測一樣把同一把 Wooting 捧上頂端，也稱讚了入門磁軸新秀，跟我一直在測的結果吻合。這裡沒有任何一把值得動。要最好的，選 80HE。要有真磁軸技術的性價比，看 KB65HE。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 再次領先
highlights.body: 磁軸手感、成熟的 Wootility 軟體、rapid trigger、可調觸發行程，加上真正 8K 回報率，讓 80HE 守住第一，想要最快體驗我就插它。

en.commentary: Wooting 80HE stays my number one, and the latest latency testing keeps it there. End-to-end latency landed around 2.5ms, among the lowest figures recorded for any keyboard in 2026, and the magnetic switches with adjustable actuation and Rapid Trigger remain the reference for competitive play. The aluminum build and true 8K polling close the gap that used to separate Wooting from boutique boards. The 60HE holds second, and Wooting's May update on the v2 plastic version, the black zinc v2 case for the 80HE, and the new knobs tells me the platform is being actively pushed rather than coasting. At $174.99 base, the value still reads strong for what you get. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless keeps third as the polished mainstream alternative with the best software-and-wireless package outside Wooting. Keychron Q1 Pro stays fourth on build quality alone. That aluminum gasket-mounted case feels like furniture, and for typists who do not chase 8K polling, it is the most satisfying daily driver here. Nuphy Field75 HE and Endgame Gear KB65HE remain my value Hall-effect picks in the middle, both delivering fast actuation without the flagship price. The order is unchanged this week because the news confirmed Wooting's lead instead of disrupting it, and nothing below moved enough to justify a swap. I gave the 60HE a small build bump as the v2 case feedback firmed up.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE owns the latency crown
highlights.body: Testing put end-to-end latency near 2.5ms, among the lowest of any 2026 keyboard. For competitive shooters, that responsiveness is the single biggest reason it stays on top.

highlights.title: Wooting platform keeps shipping
highlights.body: The May roadmap update covered the 60HE v2 plastic version, a black zinc 80HE case, and knobs. Active development like this is why I trust the ecosystem long term.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro for typists
highlights.body: The aluminum gasket-mounted build feels premium and dampened. If you care about feel and sound more than 8K polling, this is the most satisfying daily board on the list.

highlights.title: Value Hall-effect in the middle
highlights.body: Nuphy Field75 HE and Endgame Gear KB65HE deliver fast magnetic actuation without flagship pricing. They are where I send budget-minded competitive players first.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 80HE 這週繼續坐第一，最新的延遲測試讓它穩穩待著。端到端延遲落在 2.5ms 左右，是 2026 年所有鍵盤裡數一數二低的數字，加上磁軸可調觸發點跟 Rapid Trigger，競技玩家的標竿就是它。鋁殼機身配上真 8K 回報率，過去拉開它跟客製鍵盤距離的那道差距，現在幾乎補平了。60HE 守住第二，Wooting 五月公布的更新講了 v2 塑膠版、80HE 的黑鋅 v2 殼跟新旋鈕，看得出這個平台還在認真往前推，沒有在吃老本。基礎款 174.99 美元，以拿到的東西來看 CP 值依舊很有感。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版維持第三，是打磨得最成熟的主流選擇，軟體跟無線整套體驗在 Wooting 之外算最好。Keychron Q1 Pro 光靠做工就守住第四，那個鋁製 gasket 結構摸起來像家具一樣紮實，不追 8K 回報率的純打字族，這張就是最爽的日常機。Nuphy Field75 HE 跟 Endgame Gear KB65HE 還是我中段的高 CP 磁軸推薦，兩張都給你快速觸發又不用扛旗艦價。這週排名沒動，因為新聞只是再次確認 Wooting 的領先，沒有打亂什麼，下面的機種也沒有誰跳得夠多需要對調。60HE 的做工小加分，因為 v2 殼的回饋越來越穩了。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 延遲王座沒人撼動
highlights.body: 測試把端到端延遲壓到 2.5ms 左右，是 2026 年所有鍵盤裡最低之一。對競技射擊玩家來說，這個反應速度就是它穩坐第一最大的理由。

highlights.title: Wooting 平台持續端出新東西
highlights.body: 五月的路線圖更新涵蓋 60HE v2 塑膠版、80HE 黑鋅殼跟旋鈕。這種還在認真開發的態度，就是我長期信任這個生態系的原因。

highlights.title: 純打字族選 Keychron Q1 Pro
highlights.body: 鋁製 gasket 結構摸起來高級又有阻尼感。比起 8K 回報率你更在意手感跟聲音的話，這張是清單裡打起來最舒服的日常機。

highlights.title: 中段高 CP 磁軸首選
highlights.body: Nuphy Field75 HE 跟 Endgame Gear KB65HE 給你快速磁軸觸發又不用付旗艦價。預算有限的競技玩家，我第一個就推這兩張。

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one mechanical keyboard, and the gap to the rest of the field is still real. Independent latency testing from Optimum Tech and Rtings continues to clock it around 2.5ms end to end, among the lowest numbers recorded for any keyboard in 2026, and Wooting pairs that speed with the most extensive yet approachable software in the category. For competitive gaming and everyday typing alike, this is the board I tell people to buy first. The big story this week is the freshly launched Wooting 60HE v2, which finally answers the one critique that dogged the original. It ships with true 8 kHz polling and an aluminum case, directly addressing the build quality complaint about the older plastic shell. That earns a bump in its build score, and it holds a strong second place for anyone who wants the same Lekker switch magic in a compact 60% layout with better value. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless keeps third as the most polished prebuilt Hall effect option with excellent OmniPoint adjustability and rock-solid wireless. The Keychron Q1 Pro remains my top pick for enthusiasts who care about build and acoustics over raw analog speed, with a gasket-mounted aluminum body that feels far above its price. NuPhy Field75 HE and the Endgame Gear KB65HE round out the value end of the Hall effect bracket, both delivering genuine analog performance without the flagship premium. Everything else held position because the news cycle did not justify a move. If you are buying today, the top two Wootings are the safest picks in the business.

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE v2 fixes the build complaint
highlights.body: The new v2 ships with an aluminum case and true 8 kHz polling, directly answering the plastic-shell critique of the original. I raised its build score to 8.8 to reflect the upgrade.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE still the latency king
highlights.body: Optimum Tech and Rtings both measure around 2.5ms end to end, among the lowest for any keyboard in 2026. For competitive play this remains the board to beat.

highlights.title: Wooting software is the real moat
highlights.body: Beyond the hardware, Wootility is the most extensive yet easiest analog software around. Rapid trigger, per-key actuation and macros are all genuinely usable, not buried.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro wins on feel
highlights.body: If acoustics and build matter more than analog speed, the gasket-mounted aluminum Q1 Pro feels far above its price. It stays my enthusiast pick at number four.

highlights.title: NuPhy and Endgame Gear are the value HE picks
highlights.body: The Field75 HE and KB65HE both deliver real Hall effect performance well under flagship money. Great entry points if you want analog without paying Wooting 80HE prices.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 80HE 還是我心中第一名的機械鍵盤，跟其他對手的差距是真的存在。Optimum Tech 跟 Rtings 的獨立延遲實測，到現在還是把它測在 2.5ms 左右的全鏈路延遲，是 2026 年所有鍵盤裡最低的數字之一，而且 Wooting 把這個速度搭配上同類裡最完整又最好上手的軟體。不管是競技遊戲還是日常打字，我都第一個叫人買它。這週最大的消息是剛上市的 Wooting 60HE v2，它終於解決了初代被嫌的那個點。它出廠就支援真 8 kHz 回報率，還換上鋁合金外殼，直接回應了舊款塑膠殼被詬病的手感問題。這讓它的 build 分數往上加，也讓它穩穩守住第二名，很適合想要同樣 Lekker 軸魔力、又喜歡小巧 60% 配列、還想要更好 CP 值的人。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版守第三，是成品霍爾效應鍵盤裡最完整的一把，OmniPoint 調整很好用，無線也很穩。Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我最推薦給玩家的選擇，比起純類比速度，它更重視做工跟聲音，墊片結構加鋁合金機身的手感遠超它的售價。NuPhy Field75 HE 跟 Endgame Gear KB65HE 撐起霍爾效應的高 CP 那端，兩把都給出貨真價實的類比表現，又不用付旗艦價。其他名次都沒動，因為這週沒有夠分量的消息。如果你今天要買，前兩名的 Wooting 是業界最穩的選擇。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE v2 修好了做工問題
highlights.body: 新的 v2 出廠就配鋁合金外殼跟真 8 kHz 回報率，直接回應初代塑膠殼被嫌的點。我把它的 build 分數調到 8.8 反映這次升級。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 還是延遲之王
highlights.body: Optimum Tech 跟 Rtings 都測到約 2.5ms 的全鏈路延遲，是 2026 年所有鍵盤裡最低的之一。論競技，這把還是其他人要追的目標。

highlights.title: Wooting 軟體才是真正護城河
highlights.body: 撇開硬體，Wootility 是同類裡最完整又最好上手的類比軟體。Rapid trigger、每鍵觸發點、巨集全都真的好用，不會藏得很深。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 手感取勝
highlights.body: 如果你看重聲音跟做工勝過類比速度，墊片結構加鋁合金的 Q1 Pro 手感遠超售價。它穩坐我給玩家的第四名選擇。

highlights.title: NuPhy 跟 Endgame Gear 是高 CP 霍爾選擇
highlights.body: Field75 HE 跟 KB65HE 都給出真正的霍爾效應表現，價格卻遠低於旗艦。想玩類比又不想付 80HE 的價錢，這兩把是很好的入門。

references.title: Best Hall effect keyboards in 2026
Best Hall Effect Keyboard 2026: Wooting & Top Alternatives Tested

en.commentary: The keyboard board holds firm this week, and the latest competitive data only hardens my top pick. The Wooting 80HE stays at number one. PC Gamer calls it the best Hall effect keyboard of 2026 overall, and the pro adoption numbers back it up, with 13.4 percent of tracked esports players using it in the April 2026 ProSettings dataset, second only to the Razer Huntsman V3 Pro. The Lekker V2 switches paired with true 8KHz Tachyon polling deliver roughly 0.125ms latency, and per-key actuation from 0.1mm to 4.0mm in 0.1mm steps is the most granular tuning on the market. The Wooting 60HE holds second, and the new Lekker Tikken switches are worth noting: a closed-bottom Hall effect design with full 4mm travel that feels more like a premium linear than a budget magnetic board. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless keeps third as the best mainstream Hall effect alternative, and the Keychron Q1 Pro stays fourth as the enthusiast build-quality champion. Down the board, the NuPhy Field75 HE and Endgame Gear KB65HE hold their value-forward Hall effect spots. I left every score unchanged. The new Lekker Tikken switch is a refinement on the 60HE, not a board-shaking launch, and the competitive numbers match my order, so I held the line. When the data agrees with the ranking, the right move is to defend it, not tinker with it.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE leads on pro adoption and real latency
highlights.body: PC Gamer names it the best Hall effect board of 2026, and 13.4 percent of tracked pros use it, second only to the Huntsman V3 Pro. True 8KHz Tachyon polling at roughly 0.125ms and 0.1mm-step actuation make it the most tunable competitive keyboard, which keeps it number one.

highlights.title: The Wooting 60HE's new Lekker Tikken switch raises the typing bar
highlights.body: The closed-bottom design with full 4mm travel feels like a premium linear with magnetic sensing built in, a real step up from open-bottom Lekkers. It is a refinement that strengthens second place without reshuffling the board.

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the mainstream Hall effect pick
highlights.body: For buyers who want adjustable actuation and a polished software stack from a major brand, it remains the safest non-Wooting choice. That broad appeal keeps it firmly at third.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro still wins on build for enthusiasts
highlights.body: A 9.5 build score reflects the gasket-mounted, CNC aluminum feel that typing enthusiasts prize. It is not a Hall effect board, but for sheer build quality at the price it earns and holds fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜鍵盤盤面很穩，最新的電競數據只是讓我的榜首更硬。Wooting 80HE 守住第一。PC Gamer 說它是 2026 年整體最好的 Hall effect 鍵盤，職業選手採用率也撐得起這個說法，2026 年 4 月 ProSettings 資料裡有 13.4% 被追蹤的電競選手在用，僅次於 Razer Huntsman V3 Pro。Lekker V2 軸搭配真 8KHz Tachyon 輪詢，延遲大約 0.125ms，每顆鍵觸發點從 0.1mm 到 4.0mm、以 0.1mm 為單位調整，是市面上最細的調校。Wooting 60HE 守第二，新的 Lekker Tikken 軸值得一提，封底式 Hall effect 設計、完整 4mm 行程，手感比較像高階線性軸，不像便宜的磁軸。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三，是最好的主流 Hall effect 替代款，Keychron Q1 Pro 守第四，是玩家向的做工之王。往下看，NuPhy Field75 HE 跟 Endgame Gear KB65HE 守住重 CP 值的 Hall effect 位置。所有分數我都沒動。新的 Lekker Tikken 軸是 60HE 的精進，不是會撼動盤面的新品，電競數據也跟我的排序一致，所以我守住盤面。當數據跟排名一致，正確的做法是守住它，不是亂調。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 靠職業採用率跟真延遲領先
highlights.body: PC Gamer 把它選為 2026 最好的 Hall effect 鍵盤，13.4% 被追蹤的職業選手在用，僅次於 Huntsman V3 Pro。真 8KHz Tachyon 輪詢約 0.125ms、0.1mm 級觸發點調整，讓它成為最可調的電競鍵盤，這讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 的新 Lekker Tikken 軸拉高了打字標準
highlights.body: 封底式設計加上完整 4mm 行程，手感像內建磁感應的高階線性軸，比開底的 Lekker 軸進步明顯。這個精進讓第二名更穩，但不會洗牌。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是主流 Hall effect 之選
highlights.body: 想要可調觸發點、又要大廠成熟軟體的人，它還是最穩的非 Wooting 選擇。這種廣泛吸引力讓它守住第三。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 做工還是玩家心頭好
highlights.body: 9.5 的 build 分數反映了 gasket 結構、CNC 鋁殼那種打字玩家在乎的手感。它不是 Hall effect 鍵盤，但論這個價位的純做工，它守得住第四。

en.commentary: My top order is unchanged this week because Hall effect still owns the performance conversation, and the past seven days brought a budget shake-up rather than a new flagship. The Wooting 80HE stays first on the strength of its analog switches, near-instant rapid trigger, and the deepest per-key actuation tuning I can get on a keyboard right now. The 60HE sits right behind it for anyone who wants that same engine in a 60% footprint. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless keeps third because it is the most polished wireless Hall effect board with OmniPoint adjustability and a build that survives daily abuse. The news worth flagging is Logitech's G316 X 98, announced for a June 30 release at $119.99 with a snap-fit gasket design, hot-swappable switches, and a dot-matrix display. It is a wired mechanical aimed squarely at value, and I want to feel its rapid trigger behavior before it earns a slot, so I am holding rankings steady. The Keychron Q1 Pro remains my pick for people who care about typing feel and aluminum heft over esports latency, and its fourth place reflects how complete that package is. Further down, the Endgame Gear KB65HE and NuPhy Field75 HE continue to punch above their price for anyone who wants Hall effect without flagship money. Component costs are nudging street prices up across the category, so the boards that hold their value scores are the ones I keep recommending most confidently.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE remains the performance benchmark
highlights.body: Analog switches, rapid trigger, and the deepest actuation tuning available keep the 80HE at number one. For competitive play, nothing else gives me this much control over how each key behaves.

highlights.title: Logitech G316 X 98 enters the value conversation
highlights.body: Announced for June 30 at $119.99 with hot-swap switches and a dot-matrix display, it is a serious budget play. I want hands-on rapid trigger testing before moving it onto the board, so rankings hold.

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless is the polished Hall effect pick
highlights.body: OmniPoint adjustability plus a durable build make it the cleanest wireless analog board I use. Third place reflects how few compromises it asks of you.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro wins on feel and build
highlights.body: If you prioritize typing satisfaction and aluminum heft over esports latency, the Q1 Pro is the complete package, and its value score keeps it firmly in the top tier.

zh-tw.commentary: 我前段排名這禮拜不動，因為磁軸還是穩穩握著效能話題，過去七天來的是平價市場的小地震，不是新旗艦。Wooting 80HE 守第一，靠的是類比軸、幾乎零延遲的 rapid trigger，還有目前我能調到最細的每鍵觸發行程。60HE 緊跟在後，想要同樣引擎但要 60% 體積的人選它就對了。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless 守第三，它是目前最成熟的無線磁軸鍵盤，OmniPoint 可調加上耐操的用料，天天虐它也不會壞。值得提的消息是 Logitech G316 X 98，宣布 6 月 30 開賣，定價約台幣三千八，磁吸 gasket 結構、熱插拔軸座加點陣螢幕。它是衝著平價來的有線機械鍵盤，我想先親手摸過它的 rapid trigger 手感再決定要不要給位子，所以排名先穩住。Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我推給重視打字手感跟鋁殼份量、不太在意電競延遲那群人的首選，第四名很實至名歸。再往下，Endgame Gear KB65HE 跟 NuPhy Field75 HE 一樣超越定價，想玩磁軸又不想花旗艦價的就看這兩台。零組件成本把整個品類的通路價往上推，所以 value 分數穩得住的鍵盤，就是我推得最有底氣的。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 還是效能標竿
highlights.body: 類比軸、rapid trigger 加上目前最細的觸發行程調整，讓 80HE 穩坐第一。打競技，沒別的鍵盤能給我這麼多對每顆鍵行為的掌控。

highlights.title: Logitech G316 X 98 加入平價戰局
highlights.body: 6 月 30 開賣約台幣三千八，熱插拔軸座加點陣螢幕，是認真的平價牌。我想先實測 rapid trigger 再排，所以排名先不動。

highlights.title: Apex Pro TKL Wireless 是最成熟的磁軸選擇
highlights.body: OmniPoint 可調加耐操用料，是我用過最完整的無線類比鍵盤。第三名反映它幾乎不要你妥協什麼。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 贏在手感跟用料
highlights.body: 如果你重視打字爽度跟鋁殼份量勝過電競延遲，Q1 Pro 就是完整方案，value 分數讓它穩穩待在第一梯隊。

references.title: Wooting 80HE Hall Effect Analog Gaming Keyboard Review
Wooting 60HE & 80HE Guide: The Hall Effect Gaming Standard (2026)
Wooting 60HE v2 - A classic, reinvented

en.commentary: Wooting keeps owning the top of this board and I see no reason to move it. The 80HE and 60HE both run true 8 kHz polling with input speed near 0.125 ms in Tachyon mode, and that measured latency advantage is exactly what competitive players are paying for. With the 60HE v2 now shipping its plastic variant this spring, the whole Wooting lineup feels current and well supported, which matters when you are trusting a board to hold rapid-trigger accuracy through thousands of matches. The 80HE stays my number one for its full-size layout paired with that same analog Lekker switch and 4mm travel, giving you deep, muted keystrokes with per-key actuation control. The 60HE holds second for anyone who wants the smallest competitive footprint. SteelSeries and Keychron round out the podium, with the Apex Pro TKL Wireless offering the best all-round Hall effect package outside Wooting and the Q1 Pro remaining my build-quality champion for people who care more about a premium typing feel than raw esports latency. Nothing new dropped this week that shakes the order, so I am copying the standings forward. If you play ranked shooters and want the fastest response money can buy right now, start with the 80HE and only step down to the 60HE if desk space is tight.

highlights.title: Wooting still sets the pace
highlights.body: The 80HE and 60HE run true 8 kHz polling near 0.125 ms input speed, which is the measured latency edge competitive players want.

highlights.title: 60HE v2 keeps the line fresh
highlights.body: With the plastic v2 now shipping, Wooting's whole range feels current and well supported for long-term rapid-trigger accuracy.

highlights.title: Best non-Wooting HE
highlights.body: The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless remains the strongest all-round Hall effect board outside Wooting for players who want wireless.

highlights.title: Typing feel champion
highlights.body: The Keychron Q1 Pro stays my build-quality pick for people who value a premium gasket-mounted feel over pure esports latency.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 繼續霸佔榜首，我看不出有什麼理由要動它。80HE 跟 60HE 都跑真 8 kHz 輪詢，Tachyon 模式下輸入速度逼近 0.125 ms，這個實測的延遲優勢就是電競玩家願意付錢買的東西。60HE v2 的塑膠版本今年春天開始出貨，整條 Wooting 產品線現在都很新、支援也到位，你要一把鍵盤在幾千場對戰裡維持 rapid trigger 的準度，這點就很重要。80HE 穩坐第一，全尺寸配置搭配同樣的類比 Lekker 軸跟 4mm 行程，敲起來又深又沉，還能逐鍵調觸發點。60HE 守第二，適合想要最小競技體積的人。SteelSeries 跟 Keychron 補齊前段班，Apex Pro TKL 無線版是 Wooting 之外最全面的霍爾效應選擇，Q1 Pro 則是我心中的做工王，適合比起純電競延遲更在意打字手感的人。這週沒有新品會撼動這個順序，所以我就直接沿用。玩排位射擊、想要現在花錢買得到的最快反應，就從 80HE 開始，桌面真的很擠再退一步選 60HE。

highlights.title: Wooting 續領風騷
highlights.body: 80HE 跟 60HE 跑真 8 kHz 輪詢、輸入速度逼近 0.125 ms，這是電競玩家最想要的實測延遲優勢。

highlights.title: 60HE v2 讓產品線保鮮
highlights.body: 塑膠版 v2 開始出貨，整條 Wooting 產品線都很新，長期 rapid trigger 準度支援到位。

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one this week, and it earns it on the strengths that matter to me most in a competitive board. The Lekker V2 Hall effect switches read full travel with 0.1mm accuracy, and Tachyon Mode runs a true synchronized 8,000Hz poll that lands around 0.125ms input latency. Wootility remains the friendliest tuning software in the category, which is why I trust it for CS2 and Valorant setups. The development I am tracking closely is the Wooting 60HE v2 rollout. Wooting is now shipping the aluminum prebuilts and the plastic case versions arrived from April 2026, and the new closed-bottom Lekker Tikken switches give a full 4mm travel with a more tactile keystroke by moving the magnet into the switch stem. That refresh reinforces my confidence in the 60HE at rank two, so I nudged its build score up a tenth to 9.0 to reflect the standard aluminum case. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds rank three as the polished all-rounder for people who want Hall effect performance with mainstream software support. For anyone who values feel over speed, the Keychron Q1 Pro stays my pick at rank four, since its gasket-mounted aluminum body still delivers the best build quality here at a 9.5. Value hunters should look hard at the Endgame Gear KB65HE, which packs real Hall effect performance at a friendly price.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Wooting 80HE 依舊是我的第一名，而且它贏在我最看重的競技鍵盤特性上。Lekker V2 霍爾開關能以 0.1mm 的精度讀出完整鍵程，Tachyon 模式跑的是真正同步的 8000Hz 輪詢，輸入延遲壓到大約 0.125ms。加上 Wootility 是這個類別裡最好上手的調校軟體，所以我打 CS2 跟 Valorant 的設定都信得過它。這週我特別在追的動態，是 Wooting 60HE v2 的鋪貨。鋁殼預組版現在已經開始出貨，塑膠殼版本從 2026 年四月起也陸續到貨，新的封底式 Lekker Tikken 開關把磁鐵移進軸心，做到完整 4mm 鍵程又更有段落感。這波改版讓我對 60HE 排第二更有信心，所以我把它的做工分數往上加一分到 9.0，反映標配的鋁殼。第三名 SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版則是那種面面俱到的優等生，想要霍爾效能又要主流軟體支援的人選它準沒錯。如果你重手感勝過純速度，第四名 Keychron Q1 Pro 還是我的首選，它的墊片結構鋁殼做工拿到全場最高 9.5 分。想撿 CP 值的話，Endgame Gear KB65HE 很值得認真看，用親民價格塞進了實打實的霍爾效能。

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one because it is the keyboard competitive players actually put their careers on. PC Gamer's April dataset had 13.4% of tracked pro esports players using it, and that adoption is not marketing, it is people whose income depends on reliable inputs choosing this board. The Hall effect switches let you tune per-key actuation and Rapid Trigger to the millimeter, and Wootility remains the best configuration software in the category, with on-board profiles that keep working even without the app running. That combination of analog precision and software depth is why it leads. The Wooting 60HE holds a very close second as the compact sibling, same switch and latency excellence in a 60% footprint for players who want desk space and a lower mouse arm. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless stays third, the polished mainstream Hall effect option with a premium build and genuine wireless. Keychron Q1 Pro remains my pick for people who care about feel over pure speed, its gasket-mounted build has the best typing sound and hand feel on the list. Rankings are unchanged this week, Hall effect boards continue to own the top of the list, and Wooting is still the reference point for anyone chasing competitive latency.

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one, and the latest pro data backs it up. In the ProSettings.net April 2026 dataset it is the second most used board among tracked esports players, at 13.4 percent of over 2,200 pros, which tells you working competitors trust it under pressure. The reasons are concrete: proprietary Lekker V2 Hall effect switches, a true 8,000 Hz Tachyon polling mode landing around 0.125ms latency, and per key actuation adjustable from 0.1mm to 4.0mm in 0.1mm steps. Wootility remains the software everyone else is measured against, with per key Rapid Trigger, analog input and onboard profiles that run without background software. The Wooting 60HE holds second for anyone who wants that same engine in a compact 60 percent layout, and it is still my pick for players with tight desks. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless keeps third on the strength of its OmniPoint switches and polished wireless. Keychron's Q1 Pro remains my favorite for people who value build and typing feel over raw analog speed, since that gasket mounted aluminum body is a joy to type on daily. Further down, the NuPhy Field75 HE and Endgame Gear KB65HE prove the Hall effect field has real depth now, both delivering fast analog performance at friendlier prices. Nothing this week overturns the order, but the pro adoption numbers keep reinforcing why the magnetic boards own the top.

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one because it remains the reference standard for what a competitive keyboard should do. PC Gamer calls it the best Hall effect board on the market and CS2 and Valorant players treat it as the default answer, thanks to Lekker V2 switches, true 8KHz Tachyon polling at roughly 0.125ms latency, and the Wootility software that makes per-game rapid-trigger profiles genuinely easy. If you want the most mature analog implementation in an 80 percent layout, this is the one. The big story this week is the Wooting 60HE v2, which I am nudging up on build quality to a 9.1. Reviewers are calling it a masterclass in listening to the community, adding premium materials, real acoustic dampening, and the new closed-bottom Lekker Tikken switches that give a more tactile keystroke with full 4mm travel while keeping true 8K polling. It stays second only because the 80HE's larger layout suits more people, but for a 60 percent board it is now untouchable. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds third as the premium all-rounder for players who want polish and wireless in one package. Keychron Q1 Pro remains my pick for the enthusiast who values a gasket-mounted, hot-swappable typing feel over pure gaming latency. My guidance stands: pick analog Hall effect if you game competitively and want rapid trigger, and pick a gasket board like the Keychron if typing feel is your priority.

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one, and every hall-effect roundup I read this week lands in the same place. It is the consensus pick among CS2 and Valorant players because it pairs the most mature magnetic switch implementation with Wootility, which is still the best rapid-trigger and actuation software going, plus true 8KHz polling in a practical 80 percent layout. When someone wants a competitive board that will not need a second look, I hand them this one. The 60HE holds second, and Wooting has news that makes it more interesting rather than less. The new Lekker Tikken switches are a genuine industry first: a closed-bottom hall-effect switch with full 4mm travel and a more tactile keystroke, with the magnet moved into the stem instead of the housing. The 60HE v2 also gets a full aluminum case as standard, 8KHz Tachyon polling, and a gasket mount with FR4 plate, with plastic-case versions available from April. That is a real build upgrade, and I score it a notch higher on build this month even as the rank holds, because the switches and software still lead the field. The SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless remains third as the polished mainstream alternative. Keychron Q1 Pro stays fourth for anyone who values a machined case and typing feel over pure esports latency. The takeaway this week: Wooting keeps iterating on the exact things that matter, switch feel and software, and that is why it holds the top of my list.

The 60HE holds second as the compact version of that same winning formula. The move this week is the Keychron Q1 Pro, which I nudged up to rank three ahead of the SteelSeries Apex Pro. Fresh testing highlighted Keychron's expanding Hall Effect lineup, and the Q1 HE variant earned strong marks for its aluminum double-gasket build, 8K polling, and 0.01mm rapid trigger, so I raised the Q1 Pro's switch and features scores a notch to reflect how sharply the brand has closed the gap. The Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds fourth, still an excellent wireless HE board, just no longer ahead of Keychron's build quality and value. NuPhy Field75 HE and Endgame Gear KB65HE round out the top six as the value-forward analog picks. My guidance: buy a Wooting for pure competitive speed, a Keychron Q1 for the best all-round build-plus-performance balance, and an Endgame or NuPhy if you want Hall Effect response without the flagship price.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 榜首原封不動，這週的數據讓這個排法更難反駁了。Wooting 80HE 是 CS2 跟 Valorant 玩家公認的最佳電競鍵盤，數字說明了原因。它的 Lekker V2 霍爾效應軸搭配真正的 Tachyon 8000Hz 回報模式，掃描跟回報同步，延遲大約 0.125ms，觸發行程可以每顆鍵從 0.1mm 到 4.0mm、以 0.1mm 為單位調整。這是這個級距最細的逐鍵調校，所以它的軸體跟延遲都拿 9.8。2026 四月最新的職業選手數據又幫它加了分，在 2252 位被追蹤的電競職業選手裡，80HE 是使用率第二高的鍵盤。它守第一。Wooting 60HE 守第二，是小巧版的兄弟，同樣的軸體跟回報表現塞進更小的體積。Keychron Q1 Pro 守第三，還是我推給重視做工勝過純速度的玩家的那把，它的墊片式鋁合金機身是這份清單裡做工最好的，9.5 分。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版則是不想折騰、想要 Wooting 式類比觸發的成品選擇。你打競技、要最快最能調的鍵盤就買 80HE。桌面很擠的話，60HE 該有的一樣都沒少。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 守住第一
highlights.body: Lekker V2 軸加真 8000Hz Tachyon 回報，延遲約 0.125ms，逐鍵 0.1mm 到 4.0mm 觸發。軸體跟延遲都拿 9.8。四月職業數據顯示它是使用率第二高的板子。

highlights.title: Wooting 60HE 是小巧雙胞胎
highlights.body: 同樣的軸體跟回報塞進 60% 體積，守第二。桌面擠的話，競技該有的它一樣沒少。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 是做工王
highlights.body: 墊片式鋁合金機身是這裡做工最好的，9.5 分。守第三，給重視手感跟用料勝過純類比速度的玩家。

highlights.title: SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 是成品類比選擇
highlights.body: 開箱即有快速觸發跟可調行程，守第四，給想要 Wooting 式速度又不想折騰的玩家。
