en.commentary:
The Wooting 80HE holds my number one this week, and the competitive scene keeps confirming the call. Among CS2 and Valorant players it is the consensus answer, pairing the most mature Hall effect switch implementation with Wootility, still the best rapid trigger and actuation software you can run. The specs earn the hype: Lekker V2 magnetic switches, a true 8,000 Hz Tachyon polling mode landing near 0.125 ms latency, and per-key actuation adjustable from 0.1 to 4.0 mm in 0.1 mm steps. For anyone who plays to win, this is the board I recommend without hesitation.

The Wooting 60HE sits second and stays my pick for players who specifically want a compact 60 percent layout with the same magnetic magic. Keychron Q1 Pro keeps third, and I still love it as the enthusiast all-rounder, a gasket-mounted, hot-swappable board with the best typing feel in the top group for people who split time between gaming and long writing sessions.

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless and the Nuphy Field75 HE round out the upper tier, both strong Hall effect options with polished software. The value story stays compelling too: the Endgame Gear KB65HE keeps delivering flagship-class magnetic performance for noticeably less, and the Keychron K8 Pro remains the budget champion for anyone who wants a great board without chasing analog features. What is clear this cycle is that Hall effect is now the default answer for competitive play, and Wooting still sets the ceiling everyone else measures against.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE is the competitive standard
highlights.body: Lekker V2 switches, true 8,000 Hz polling near 0.125 ms latency, and Wootility's best-in-class rapid trigger make it the CS2 and Valorant consensus pick.

highlights.title: 60HE for compact players
highlights.body: It brings the same magnetic performance in a 60 percent layout, my recommendation for anyone who wants a smaller desk footprint without losing capability.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro for all-rounders
highlights.body: Gasket-mounted and hot-swappable with the best typing feel up top, it is the pick for people who split time between gaming and long writing.

highlights.title: Endgame Gear KB65HE leads on value
highlights.body: It delivers flagship-class Hall effect performance for noticeably less, keeping it my go-to when budget matters but you still want magnetic switches.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週我還是把 Wooting 80HE 放第一，電競場也一直在幫我背書。在 CS2 和 Valorant 玩家之間它幾乎是公認答案，把最成熟的霍爾磁軸實作，配上 Wootility 這套至今最好用的 rapid trigger 和觸發行程軟體。規格對得起話題度，Lekker V2 磁軸、真正 8,000 Hz 的 Tachyon 輪詢模式把延遲壓到約 0.125 毫秒，每顆鍵觸發點還能從 0.1 到 4.0mm、以 0.1mm 為級距自由調。只要你是打來求勝的人，這把我會毫不猶豫推薦。

Wooting 60HE 排第二，是我推薦給就是想要 60% 小配列、又要同一套磁軸魔法玩家的選擇。Keychron Q1 Pro 守著第三，我還是很愛它這種玩家全能款，Gasket 結構、熱插拔，打字手感在前段班裡最好，很適合遊戲和長時間打字兩邊都要兼顧的人。

SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版和 Nuphy Field75 HE 補齊上段，兩把都是軟體成熟的霍爾磁軸好選擇。性價比這條線也依舊誘人，Endgame Gear KB65HE 持續用明顯更低的價格端出旗艦級磁軸表現，Keychron K8 Pro 則仍是預算王者，適合只想要一把好鍵盤、不特別追磁軸功能的人。這輪很明顯，霍爾磁軸已經是競技的預設答案，而 Wooting 還是那個大家拿來當天花板量的品牌。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 是競技標準
highlights.body: Lekker V2 磁軸、真正 8,000 Hz 輪詢把延遲壓到約 0.125 毫秒，加上 Wootility 頂級 rapid trigger，是 CS2 和 Valorant 的公認之選。

highlights.title: 小配列選 60HE
highlights.body: 同一套磁軸表現濃縮進 60% 配列，是我推薦給想要更省桌面空間、又不想犧牲實力玩家的機型。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 給全能派
highlights.body: Gasket 結構加熱插拔，打字手感在前段班裡最好，是遊戲和長時間打字兩邊兼顧者的首選。

highlights.title: Endgame Gear KB65HE 性價比領先
highlights.body: 用明顯更低的價格端出旗艦級霍爾磁軸表現，是預算有限又想要磁軸時我的首推。

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one, and the latest round of reviews only cements it: this is still the best Hall Effect keyboard overall for the strongest mix of gaming performance, software and practical layout. What earns the top spot is the total package, the Lekker V2 switches paired with true 8,000Hz Tachyon polling land input latency near 0.125ms, per-key actuation adjusts from 0.1mm to 4.0mm, and Rapid Trigger, SOCD and four-action Dynamic Keystroke all ship standard. Critically, the Wootility software is the best in the category, so all that power is actually usable rather than buried in menus. The Wooting 60HE holds second and stays the call if you specifically want a compact 60 percent board with the same switch and latency pedigree. Keychron Q1 Pro remains third as the enthusiast's pick for anyone who prioritizes a premium gasket-mounted typing feel over pure esports speed, its build quality is genuinely a cut above. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL Wireless holds fourth as the most polished mainstream alternative. Value hunters still get the fundamentals from the Keychron K8 Pro and Nuphy Air75 V2. My advice is unchanged: buy Hall Effect if you play competitively, buy a great gasket board if you type all day, and let software quality break the tie. Rankings hold steady this week, the review cycle reaffirms Wooting's lead rather than challenging it.

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE is the total package
highlights.body: Lekker V2 switches, true 8,000Hz polling near 0.125ms latency, and per-key actuation from 0.1mm to 4.0mm. The 80HE leads because it combines top speed with features that ship standard, not as extras.

highlights.title: Software makes the difference
highlights.body: Wootility is the best configuration software in the category, so the 80HE's depth is actually usable. Rapid Trigger and Dynamic Keystroke only matter if you can tune them easily, and here you can.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro for typists
highlights.body: The Keychron Q1 Pro holds third as the enthusiast pick, with premium gasket-mounted build that feels a cut above. If all-day typing feel matters more than esports speed, this is your board.

highlights.title: Buy Hall Effect for competition
highlights.body: If you play competitive FPS, the adjustable actuation and Rapid Trigger of a Hall Effect board are a genuine edge. For pure typing, a great gasket board serves you better, match the board to the use.

zh-tw.commentary: Wooting 80HE 還是我的第一名，最新一輪評測只是把它焊得更死，它依然是整體最強的霍爾效應鍵盤，遊戲效能、軟體、實用配列的組合最猛。拿第一靠的是整包到位，Lekker V2 軸配上真正的 8000Hz Tachyon 輪詢，輸入延遲逼近 0.125 毫秒，每顆鍵觸發點能從 0.1mm 調到 4.0mm，Rapid Trigger、SOCD、四段式動態鍵程全都是標配。關鍵是 Wootility 軟體是類別裡最好的，這些強大功能你真的用得到，不是埋在選單裡。Wooting 60HE 守第二，你就是想要 60% 精巧配列又要同樣軸體跟延遲水準的話，選它。Keychron Q1 Pro 守第三，是玩家的選擇，重視高級 gasket 結構打字手感勝過純電競速度的人選它，它的用料真的高一階。SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL 無線版守第四，是最精緻的主流替代。預算派還是能從 Keychron K8 Pro 跟 Nuphy Air75 V2 拿到基本盤。我的建議沒變，打競技就買霍爾效應，整天打字就買好的 gasket 板，軟體品質當決勝的那一票。這週排名維持，這輪評測是再度確認 Wooting 領先，不是挑戰它。

highlights.title: Wooting 80HE 整包到位
highlights.body: Lekker V2 軸、真正 8000Hz 輪詢逼近 0.125 毫秒延遲、每顆鍵觸發點 0.1mm 到 4.0mm 可調。80HE 領先，因為頂速加上全標配的功能，不是要另外加價的選配。

highlights.title: 軟體才是差別
highlights.body: Wootility 是類別裡最好的設定軟體，讓 80HE 的深度真的用得到。Rapid Trigger 跟動態鍵程要能輕鬆調才有意義，這裡你調得到。

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro 給打字派
highlights.body: Keychron Q1 Pro 守第三，是玩家選擇，高級 gasket 結構手感高一階。整天打字手感比電競速度重要的話，這就是你的板子。

highlights.title: 打競技就買霍爾效應
highlights.body: 打競技 FPS 的話，霍爾效應板的可調觸發點跟 Rapid Trigger 是實打實的優勢。純打字，好的 gasket 板更適合你，配著用途選板子。

en.commentary: The Wooting 80HE stays my number one, and the competitive scene keeps proving the point. It runs proprietary Lekker V2 Hall effect switches with true 8,000Hz Tachyon polling, roughly 0.125ms input latency, and per-key actuation adjustable from 0.1mm to 4.0mm, which is why it holds a 9.8 on both switches and latency. In ProSettings.net's April 2026 dataset of 2,252 tracked CS2 and Valorant pros, the 80HE ranked second at 13.41 percent, and every top keyboard on that list now uses analog optical or Hall effect switches. Traditional mechanicals have essentially left the pro scene, and this list reflects that. The Wooting 60HE stays second as the compact answer for anyone who wants the same performance in a 60 percent layout, and its slightly better build earns a 9.1. The Keychron Q1 Pro holds third as the pick for people who value a premium gasket-mounted typing feel and a QMK/VIA ecosystem over pure gaming latency, scoring a category-best 9.5 on build. SteelSeries Apex Pro TKL and NuPhy Field75 HE round out the strong Hall effect tier. Nothing this week moves the order.

highlights.title: The pros have gone Hall effect
highlights.body: In April 2026's 2,252-pro dataset, the 80HE ranked second, and every top board uses analog or Hall effect. Traditional mechanicals left the scene.

highlights.title: 60HE for the compact crowd
highlights.body: Same Wooting performance in a 60 percent layout, with slightly better build at 9.1. If desk space is tight, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Keychron Q1 Pro for typists
highlights.body: A category-best 9.5 build with premium gasket-mounted feel and QMK/VIA. When typing pleasure beats raw latency, it wins.
